Name: Persalt USA
Description:
Engineers with extensive experience in liquid separations technologies gained since the 1980s came together to establish Persalt. They embraced the challenge of providing the industry with high-quality products that deliver low operational costs and are more affordable than those offered by traditional leading suppliers.

At Persalt, we specialize in advanced industrial and municipal water treatment solutions, prioritizing sustainability, and innovation.

We provide cutting-edge reverse osmosis membranes and ion exchange resins for effective water treatment, reuse, and processing. Our state-of-the-art products maximize performance in desalination and demineralization systems.

We take pride in our expanding presence in South America, where we have rapidly increased our market share and effectively displaced competitors' products among key users of membranes and ion exchange resins.

This success is due to two key factors: our optimized operational structure, which enables us to offer outstanding products at competitive prices, and our specialized engineers' dedication to developing innovative solutions for complex water treatment challenges.

All our products are NSF-certified and made from the highest quality materials.

We provide membranes for low fouling (LF) and low-pressure drop (LPD) characteristics, ensuring reduced operational costs and longer lifespans. Our ultrafiltration membranes are crafted from robust fibers, making them ideal for water treatment and reuse applications.

Furthermore, our uniform particle-size resin line features high-capacity ion exchange and high-surface-area adsorption resins, minimizing operational costs.

We provide superior technical support to all users of our products.

Name: OptySun
Description:
OptySun is a fully self-contained device for rapid water purification and disinfection in any place, including emergency conditions. Can be used both indoors and outdoors.

According to WHO statistics, more than 2 billion people lack free access to clean and safe drinking water. Very often, such situations arise due to man-made, natural, humanitarian disasters, wars and other emergency events. At the same time, the use of traditional methods of individual water purification becomes difficult due to the lack of the necessary pressure, consumables, a stable source of electricity, etc.

OptySun offers a completely self-contained solution for a small group of people who find themselves in an environment without drinking water. For its operation, it is only necessary to have water of any quality and access to sunlight or a source of electricity (battery, network, etc.). The complete absence of consumables, chemicals.

The principle of operation is based on a combination of several technologies - ozone, ultraviolet and physical (cleansing from large particles).

Our device can purify water in almost any conditions. Kills 99.9% of germs. Does not require consumables. Provides five daily servings of water every 30 minutes.

It can be used both in domestic conditions and in derivatives for disinfection and purification of process water.

Over the next three years Spotless Water will be dispensing ultra pure water from more than 450 self-service locations in the UK, providing cost-effective convenience, reliability and quality to the cleaning industry.

Download the Spotless Water app on Apple or Android to find your local filling station, set up an account, load credit and download invoices. We offer sliding scale discounts to everyone from national cleaning companies with multi-van fleets, to ‘one man and a van’ setups.

“ At Spotless we have a mission to challenge the industry standard and to raise the bar, by finding gaps in our market place and delivering unrivalled service levels while establishing a culture that supports our team members, so they can provide exceptional service to our clients. ”

To find out more, please go to www.spotlesswater.co.uk or the app store to download our app.

Name: IWA Statistics & Economics SG
Description: The Statistics and Economics Specialist Group serves as a platform for discussing all statistical and economic topics in the water industry, such as financing, water tariff structures, performance measurement, microeconomics analysis, and efficiency management. Annual workshops and seminars, along with publications, facilitate information sharing on fundamental and practical issues. Every four years, the group hosts the International IWA Conference on Water Economics, Statistics, and Finance. By collaborating with other IWA Specialist Groups, it aligns with the association’s strategic goals. The group conducts worldwide surveys to provide water industry statistics, enabling comparisons on abstraction, consumption, tariffs, and regulations globally, fostering debate and informing decision-making in the water sector.

Name: H2OLL
Description: H2OLL disruptive technology was developed by leading scientists in the Technion - Israel Institute of Technology. The patented absorption technology is based on an unexploited, unlimited new source: Air, instead of water from existing sources. The absorption cycle for Atmospheric Water Generation (AWG), has a unique capability to create high quality, affordable drinking water 24x7, even in dry inland areas, where other technologies fail to provide a viable solution.

With a 60-year in-the-ground track record, we pride ourselves not only on the quality of our fittings but on our high standards of service, delivery, and after-sales support. Uniquely placed in the UK market to supply a full range of fittings and accessories for PE pipe, our dedicated sales and technical team will work with you to provide the foremost solutions for joining water and gas supply systems.

Description:
Depuis 2007, la SAS HYDROMOBIL conçoit et met en œuvre sur les sites internationaux de ses clients, des prises d'eau mobiles, plug and play et à impact environnemental faible.

Entièrement préfabriquées en usine, nos stations intègrent un système de pompage conçu pour minimiser vos travaux de génie civil et d’aménagements sur site, réduisant ainsi significativement les coûts et délais du projet global.

Notre savoir-faire, riche de 17 ans de retour d’expérience et d’améliorations éprouvées, nous a permis de vous proposer des prises d’eau ichtyophiles, s'adaptant au profil des berges, et pouvant être exploitées quel que soit le marnage, tout en évitant l'envasement. 

Ce procédé de captage des eaux s’adapte à toutes fluctuations du niveau pour pomper la tranche d'eau optimale, en surface, à une immersion spécifique, ou en profondeur, dans tous types de plans d'eau. 

Nous assurons la définition de la prise d’eau selon votre besoin et l’environnement du projet, la conception, le pilotage de la fabrication, l’assemblage à blanc en atelier, l’export du matériel et le montage définitif sur site de nos stations de pompage, ainsi que l’après-vente.

Name: Caribbean Water Treatment Ltd.
Description:
Caribbean Water Treatment Ltd. was incorporated in St. John’s in August 1992 under the Companies Act of Antigua & Barbuda. It is a privately held, 100% Antiguan-owned corporation. Since the doors opened on October 1, 1992, the company has grown locally and regionally to become a leading provider of water and wastewater treatment services in the Eastern Caribbean.

The company’s founder and managing director, Mr. J. Mario Bento, has over thirty years of experience in water treatment in North America and the Caribbean. He holds a Bachelor of Applied Science degree in Chemical Engineering from the University of Toronto and a Master in Environmental Systems Engineering from McMaster University in Canada. 
 
In addition to work terms at ESSO Chemical in Canada and the Antigua Public Utilities Authority (APUA) Crabbs Desalination Plant, Mr. Bento also worked four years as a process development engineer for Zenon Environmental Inc. in Canada, a worldwide leader in the development and manufacture of membrane-based systems for water and wastewater treatment. 
 
At Zenon, Mr. Bento managed process development projects for several large industrial clients across Canada and the U.S., including IBM, Maxwell House, Procter & Gamble, and Kraft General Foods.

The company specializes in seawater desalination, water and wastewater treatment services, and swimming pool services. Serving commercial, residential, and industrial customers in Antigua and other Caribbean islands. 

CWT provides a full range of services including:
 
- Design and Consulting Services
- Equipment Sales and Procurement
- Equipment Installation
- Repairs
- Operation and Maintenance Contracts
- Sales of Water Treatment Chemicals and Supplies

Name: Water Storage Tanks, Inc.
Description:
Water Storage Tanks, Inc. manufactures reliably engineered galvanized steel water tanks and TimberTanks for commercial and residential use. We pride ourselves on bringing only the best quality tanks to the market and distribute through a carefully selected national network of dealers. Our CorGal line of water storage tanks range from 6' to 105' in diameter and can easily accommodate more than 500,000 gallons of stored water. Most tanks are custom engineered to meet the specific standards outlined for each unique installation and carry a 30 year structural warranty. CorGal tanks have been successfully utilized for traditional rainwater collection, fire protection, storm water retention, mining applications, and winery/agricultural use.

TimberTanks can be sourced directly from TimberTank Enterprises of New Zealand or built from domestic materials. TimberTanks water storage tanks combine the ageless beauty of wood with the durability of galvanized steel roofs and the modern technology of flexible membrane liners for water containment. These are truly magnificent structures for customers who want to add old world charm.

Our team will also provide consulting services for repair or replacement of many old wood tanks and wood water towers. 



TYPICAL APPLICATIONS FOR  CORGAL TANKS 
 
Stormwater detention and treatment tanks
Potable water storage tanks
Fire protection water storage tanks
Enclosures, houses, cabins
Irrigation water tanks
Septic and gray water tanks
Mining, minerals & quarry bins

Brewery & Winery tanks
Thermal storage and water cooling tanks

For more information on CorGal tanks, please visit: www.corgaltanks.com

For more information on TimberTanks, please visit: www.timbertanksamerica.com

We are a voluntary-membership, not-for-profit incorporated society whose mission is to create an environment for the responsible use of water for food and fibre production.

As an organisation we actively promote best practice irrigation and carry out a range of training and education activities. Over the last five years we have trained over 3,000 irrigators on different aspects of irrigation best practice to improve water use efficiency and better manage environmental effects.

Name: BLUEMATER SA
Description:
The EU (European Union) aims to be climate-neutral by 2050 – an economy with net-zero greenhouse gas emissions. This objective is at the heart of the European Green Deal and in line with the EU’s commitment to global climate action under the Paris Agreement. The transition to a climate-neutral society is both an urgent challenge and an opportunity to build a better future for all.

BLUEMATER aims to be part of the solution to these problems, in a sustainable and eco-efficient basis, by deploying technologies that do not use chemicals, built on modular systems that can be retrofit, reducing up to 50% of OPEX costs, complying with the current legislation and promoting a circular economy having a faster ROI as a result. BLUEMATER will contribute to the reduction of a fraction of environmental pollution, through the treatment of effluents and leachate, to a lesser deterioration of the quality of water bodies, treating discharges in these water bodies, to reduce water scarcity, treating certain effluents allowing these to be reused, and to reduce air pollution through the treatment of gases and odors.

At SBR Contracting, we understand the pressure of getting a site up and running. Our capabilities span mining, infrastructure, earthworks, and civil projects, with a strong focus on safety, quality, and efficiency.

Whether it's the red dirt of the Pilbara or the remote edges of the Kimberley, our team brings the tools, expertise and flexibility to deliver results. Since 2022, we’ve helped partners across the region get their sites operational quickly, safely and with long-term performance in mind.

Since launching in 2022 in Western Australia, we've successfully delivered over 20+ projects, working with more than 15 trusted partners and building a skilled team of 20+ professionals. We offer a full suite of services including HDPE welding, piping system design, maintenance, and upgrades, all tailored to meet the demands of each site and client.

We’re proud to lead with adaptable, forward-thinking practices that support both performance and sustainability.

SBR Contracting is a partner you can count on; we’re more than contractors. We’re problem solvers, welders, operators and planners, all working together to move your project forward, helping you get your mine-site operational faster.

consommation d’eau et à la diminution de l’empreinte carbone de ses clients, en intégrant des approches circulaires et bas carbone dans ses solutions. 
Son maillage territorial et son expertise technique lui permettent d'apporter une réactivité, proximité et un accompagnement sur-mesure à ses clients issus des secteurs agroalimentaire, chimique, énergétique et manufacturier.

Name: Clean Water Global
Description:
Sustainability might be the word on everyone's lips, but at Clean Water Global (CWG), we're taking a big leap beyond just "sustaining." 
It's time for a new approach. Right now, the coatings industry is responsible for the contamination with 7.2 megatons of microplastics into our water systems every year. 
And it's not just about microplastics – paint also contains harmful heavy metals and biocides that harm aquatic life . 
But imagine if we could collect and reuse these materials? That's exactly what we're doing here at CWG.

We're tackling the growing problem of water pollution in the coatings industry head-on, by introducing easy-to-use logistical systems alongside decentralized water purification technologies . 
Our method is turning the industry from a major polluter into a model of circular economy, providing significant financial benefits for everyone involved .

Our eyes are set on the global stage, aiming to make a deep social and environmental impact all around the world . Join us as we fight against pollution and work towards a cleaner, circulair future for the coatings industry and our planet.

Name: Yellow Sub Hydro
Description:
Hello!
Yellow Sub Hydro is a proudly triple-bottom-line B Corp certified business seeking to profitably address BIG climate change-related problems with passion and purpose. 

We have developed a water resource management engineering Software as a Service (SaaS) product. More than a model, this cloud based application offers near real-time simulations of coupled surface and groundwater at catchment scale. We call this virtual environment for interactive and collaborative experiments on the hydrological system, Periscope. 

Periscope is an entirely new system of managing and communicationg strategic water resources – reimagined from first principles – where ALL stakeholders in water can evaluate a broad range of ‘what if’ scenarios’. By democratising access to data and decisions around water in this way, we (as a population) dramatically increase our chance of making better decisions around our most precious of shared resources.

Part of a B Corp Group.

Following this next round of pilots, we anticipate selling our first commercial systems in 2025.

Name: Aqua Innovation
Description:
We develop, produce and market water and air processing units, in particular filtration techniques and disinfection units using UV-C light.
 
Precision and Quality
Thanks to many years of experience with treatment technology, permanent innovations and expertise specific to the industry, we successfully develop, produce, sell and install water processing units and put them into operation. Aqua Innovation GmbH systematically focuses on innovative, cutting-edge technology for a wide range of areas of application, from small private households to communal water supplies, for example in Basel and Bern.
 
Our programme for UV-C disinfection units encompasses a wide range of devices and special custom units, all of which are designed to be compact and modular. Other units are used for ozone reduction, elimination of residual ozone, TOC decomposition down to the necessary values for ultrapure water, and for special applications such as air and surface disinfection. All units are state of the art and cover almost all potential usage scenarios.
 
Nationally Anchored – Internationally Competent
Aqua Innovation GmbH is known worldwide as a partner for integrated solutions in a wide range of industries, including for difficult water treatment tasks. These high demands are not only fulfilled in development and manufacturing of the units, but also in consultation, service, maintenance and support. We place great importance on our units being produced in Switzerland and the components coming from Swiss suppliers and EU countries, allowing us to supervise our customers long-term and sustainably.
 
Aqua Innovation GmbH stands for customer proximity, reliability and individual service at the highest level. This also describes the core principles of Aqua Innovation GmbH, namely motivation, precision, quality and constant enthusiasm for innovations.

A keag Water rege-se sempre por altos standards de qualidade do produto fornecido e do serviço prestado, sempre com base numa relação de seriedade, confiança e compromisso que estabelece com clientes e fornecedores.

Name: Premier Water Services Sdn. Bhd.
Description:
Premier Water Services (PWS) was established in February 2012 with an aim to improvise Advance Pressure Management Control (APMCTM), smart water metering and automated remote data acquisitions, together with strategic allocation of workforce and technical advantages of parent companies. Under the full support of the parent companies, resources are shared with Premier Water Services. These include experience and highly skilled teams in NRW industries ranging from Project Execution, Ground Staff, Administration and Management teams.

Advance Pressure Management and Control (APMC) is an advanced initiative, designed to manage and sustain water pressure in a District Monitoring Zone or Area to reduce head losses as well as contribute to the reduction of NRW levels in the water supply system. Added advantages of APMCTM include a optimised water pressure, lower leakage frequency, less pipe burst frequency and more even water pressure throughout the system. Furthermore, with the support and backing of the parent companies, PWS’ ventures are not limited to APMC but also to provide a holistic approach to NRW issues. These include application of a variety of technologies, systems and initiatives with a single goal: "To manage, Control and Reduce NRW".

As of 2014, Premier Water Services has been awarded as the sole distributor of Technolog UK products in Malaysia.
Technolog is the leading company in the design and manufacture of data loggers, pressure regulators, automated meter reading for water and gas applications, with over 30 years of experience.

Name: Sensiblue
Description:
Sensiblue developed and constructed a revolutionary new sanitary device for drinking water disinfection.

In many countries around the world, drinking water from the tap can be a hazard. As a result you may decide to buy mineral water instead, but that is costly and time-consuming. A safer and easier way would be to use the Sensiblue. Sensiblue can easily be installed to your current (drinking) water supply system, offers full protection from bacteria, does not require a connection to the main power line and is low on maintenance.

Sensiblue effectively eliminates bacteria, such as legionella bacteria and E-Coli.

Name: Interreg CARE+
Description:
FR - Le projet nommé Coopération Transfrontalière pour des Actions pour la Ressource en Eau (CARE+) vise à améliorer la qualité de l’eau des cours d’eau à enjeux situés dans le bassin hydrographique international de l’Escaut, plus précisément sur les bassins versants transfrontaliers de la Lys et de l’Yser. Ces cours d’eau sont actuellement concernés par de multiples pollutions, parmi lesquelles celles issues de l’activité agricole intensive. Les produits phytosanitaires et les nutriments régulièrement utilisés par les agriculteurs du territoire impactent fortement la qualité des cours d’eau, tout comme les pratiques véhiculant des matières en suspension, notamment lors de fortes pluies. Ces pollutions mettent en danger les usages existants de la ressource, tels que l’alimentation en eau potable ou l’irrigation. Le projet CARE+ se concentrera sur ces problématiques agricoles.  

NL - Het project genaamd Grensoverschrijdende Samenwerking voor Acties ter ondersteuning van de Watervoorraden (CARE+) heeft als doel de waterkwaliteit te verbeteren van de belangrijke waterlopen in het internationale stroomgebied van de Schelde, en meer bepaald in de grensoverschrijdende stroombekkens van de Leie en van de IJzer. Deze waterlopen hebben momenteel te kampen met verontreinigingen van allerlei aard, waaronder deze die veroorzaakt worden door de intensieve landbouw.

Name: FluidLytix Intelligent Water Management
Description:
FluidLytix | Intelligent Water Management for Commercial, Industrial and Government. The FluidLytix System reduces water utility costs by up to 30%. Stop paying for air in your water bill.

How it works: The FluidLytix System regulates the volumetric flow of water by restricting the volume of excess air in the water line. Reduces water usage and costs for hospitals, hotels, schools, commercial buildings, restaurants, car washes, apartments, golf courses, water parks and other business that uses water. Water costs are rising. Our Earth's water resources are rapidly diminishing. The goal of FluidLytix is to reduce water expense and water usage.

Name: aqua.naturale Beregnung
Description:
Aqua Naturale Beregnung – Natürliche Effizienz für grüne Lebensräume

Aqua Naturale steht für moderne, nachhaltige und maßgeschneiderte Beregnungslösungen. Wir bringen Wasser gezielt und effizient dorthin, wo es gebraucht wird – in private Gärten, öffentliche Grünanlagen, Sportplätze, landwirtschaftliche Flächen und gewerbliche Außenbereiche. Mit einem ganzheitlichen Ansatz verbinden wir Technik und Natur im Einklang – für gesunde Pflanzen, lebendige Landschaften und verantwortungsvollen Ressourceneinsatz.

Unsere Leistungen reichen von der professionellen Planung über die präzise Installation bis hin zur regelmäßigen Wartung und Optimierung von Beregnungsanlagen. Dabei arbeiten wir mit hochwertigen Komponenten führender Hersteller und setzen auf intelligente Steuerungssysteme, die Wasser sparen und gleichzeitig höchste Funktionalität gewährleisten.

Ob Sie als Privatkunde Ihren Garten automatisieren möchten, als Unternehmen auf gepflegte Grünflächen setzen oder als Kommune auf nachhaltige Infrastrukturlösungen Wert legen – Aqua Naturale ist Ihr zuverlässiger Partner. Unsere Lösungen sind individuell anpassbar, wetterabhängig steuerbar und langfristig effizient.

Was uns antreibt, ist die Überzeugung, dass eine grüne Umwelt nur durch den bewussten Umgang mit natürlichen Ressourcen erhalten bleibt. Deshalb ist Nachhaltigkeit für uns kein Trend, sondern ein Versprechen.

Aqua Naturale Beregnung – weil jeder Tropfen zählt.

Name: ClearStream Irrigation
Description:
Resolving those problem areas, you were told were unfixable. Current Irrigation Challenges in most aging Communities
•	Aging PVC lines that are brittle, leaking, or undersized for current pressure requirements.
•	Outdated zone valves and controllers that no longer operate efficiently or consistently.
•	Broken or mismatched sprinkler heads, resulting in uneven water distribution.
•	Manual or analog controllers with no smart or weather-based features.
•	Lack of water flow monitoring or leak detection, leading to waste and high water bills.
•	Noncompliance with newer water-use regulations and best practices for irrigation efficiency.
 ClearStream Irrigation can assist your efforts bringing your community’s system up to compliance and modern standards:
A. System Repair & Efficiency Compliance
•	Repair of Leaks & Broken Components:
o	Florida Statutes (373.62) and local ordinances require proper maintenance and repair of automatic sprinkler systems to prevent water waste.
o	Any leaks, overspray onto pavement, or malfunctioning heads can result in citations or fines if not corrected.
•	Pressure Regulation:
o	Modern systems must operate under regulated water pressure to prevent misting and runoff — older systems often lack this feature.
•	Zone Functionality:
o	Each irrigation zone must function independently and deliver uniform coverage to meet Florida-Friendly Landscaping standards and water efficiency codes.
B. Controller and Sensor Requirements
•	Rain Sensor Law (Florida Statute 373.62):
o	All automatic irrigation systems must include a functioning rain shutoff device or soil moisture sensor.
o	Many older communities installed early versions decades ago that are no longer operational or compliant.

Wasser! Die Grundlage des Lebens

Grundsätzliches Ziel ist es, Wasserverluste zu vermeiden und die Wasserqualität zu verbessern.

Welche Themen stehen bei uns im Vordergrund?
- THE WAY TO ZEROWATERLOSS
- Kreislaufwirtschaft („Circular Economy Action Plan“)
- Nachhaltige Ressourcennutzung
- Langlebigkeit, Reparaturfreundlichkeit, Wiederverwendbarkeit und Recyclingfähigkeit 
- Rezyklate, nachwachsende Rohstoffe, Vermeidung von Mikroplastik
- Null-Schadstoff-Aktionsplan 
- CO2 Reduzierung
- Rohstoffschonende, energiesparende, schadstoffarme und abfallarme Produktionsverfahren

Name: MUKO
Description:
Muko is een oplossing waarmee regenwater in de bestaande bouw op een eenvoudige, degelijke en betaalbare manier afgekoppeld kan worden van het riool. Hiermee biedt het een bijdrage aan het tegengaan van hittestress, droogte & wateroverlast. 

Dit wordt gedaan door een oplossing te bieden die aan de bestaande hemelwaterafvoer gemakkelijk kan worden geïnstalleerd. De infiltratiebuis maakt het mogelijk om regenwater meteen grote capaciteit af te geven op plaatsen waar dat gewenst wordt en verspreid over een groot oppervlak.

Circa 80% procent van de regen zal door middel van de Muko teruggegeven worden aan de omgeving (tuin). De overige 20% stroomt alsnog weg via het riool en dient als doorspoeling en beperkt de overlast bij hevige stortbuien. 

De groene voetafdruk: Naast de werking is de Muko ook op meerdere vlakken groen. Zo worden er recyclebare en gerecyclede materialen gebruikt. Biobased materialen behoren in de nabije toekomst tot de mogelijkheid. Dit om het beste duurzame effect op het klimaat te realiseren.

Een eenvoudige installatie voor de hovenier en doe-het-zelver. De muko kenmerkt zich door eenvoud en degelijkheid. De hoogwaardige materialen zitten verpakt in een kant-en-klaar pakket met een duidelijke handleiding.

Bent u bezig met klimaatadaptatie, renovaties/ verduurzaming of andere projecten? Neem gerust contact op. We denken graag met u mee om uw project tot een succes te brengen.

We are dedicated to creating innovative solutions that provide clean, safe drinking water and products for effective surface disinfection in an environmentally friendly manner. 
Filtration	 →  → 
To achieve this, we developed a unique water purification system—PaquaVida—and a safe, eco-friendly biocide—PaquaLyte.

Our technology can transform nearly any freshwater source into clean drinking water without causing harm to the environment.

Leveraging advanced technology, our partners PaquaVida upholds the highest safety standards in water purification without relying on harsh chemicals.

The system operates on minimal power, enabling water purification in remote areas while also lowering treatment costs and reducing your carbon footprint.

PaquaLyte merges nature and science to offer a user-friendly sanitation solution that effectively eradicates harmful microorganisms while being entirely non-toxic and environmentally safe.

If you have a freshwater source that needs treatment to comply with stringent drinking water standards, we are here to assist. If you seek a cost-effective, efficient, and effective sanitation solution, we can help.

PaquaVida ensures water safety through several key features. It utilizes advanced filtration and purification technologies that effectively remove contaminants, including bacteria, viruses, and harmful chemicals, while retaining essential minerals. The system operates without harsh chemicals, relying instead on natural processes to achieve high safety standards. Additionally, rigorous testing protocols are in place to verify that the water meets or exceeds regulatory drinking water standards, ensuring that users receive safe and clean drinking water.

The capacity of PaquaVida for large-scale operations can vary depending on the specific configuration and setup. Generally, it can be adapted to purify thousands of liters of water per day, making it suitable for communities, agricultural projects, and industrial applications.

At WaveSave, we transform water challenges into opportunities for resilience. We pioneer advanced water control technologies that protect communities and industries from both flood devastation and drought scarcity.

Our Solutions
Our flagship WAVEDAM system stands as the world's most effective mobile flood barrier, delivering unmatched protection with rapid deployment capabilities. When critical infrastructure and communities face rising waters, our solutions provide the first line of defense.
Beyond flood protection, our integrated water storage systems offer comprehensive water security—capturing excess during floods and preserving it for use during drought conditions.

Our Approach
We combine centuries of Dutch water management expertise with cutting-edge engineering to create solutions that work with nature, not against it. Every WaveSave product reflects our commitment to:
- Environmental Stewardship: Using eco-friendly materials and energy-efficient processes
- Adaptability: Designing flexible systems that respond to evolving challenges
- Reliability: Ensuring dependable performance when communities need it most

Our Impact
In partnership with governments, NGOs, and forward-thinking businesses worldwide, we're building water resilience into the fabric of vulnerable communities. Our solutions don't just protect infrastructure—they preserve livelihoods, ecosystems, and peace of mind in an increasingly unpredictable climate.

Join us in creating a water-secure future where communities thrive regardless of what nature brings.

Contact us at: info@wavesave.com

Description:
Open Smart Irrigation (OSI) is a Swiss non-profit initiative that makes smart irrigation technology accessible to smallholder farmers in low- and middle-income countries.
Born from field research at Agroscope, OSI combines open-source software with practical on-ground training to help farmers adapt to climate change through smarter water management.

Our software platform, OSI OS, enables affordable, data-driven irrigation supporting low-cost sensors and local processing - operating entirely offline where connectivity is limited.
Through the OSI Academy, we deliver step-by-step learning resources and field trainings in collaboration with universities and government partners.

By empowering local “super-users” through comprehensive training on intelligent soil and water management, OSI strengthens climate resilience, improves water efficiency, and supports sustainable food production for vulnerable farming communities.

Name: The GreenSpace Project
Description: The Greenspace Project (GSP) enhances water use efficiency through advanced data analytics and remote sensing to mitigate drought impacts and optimize resource management. The project employs various remote sensing techniques, including NDVI mapping to monitor vegetation health, parcellation to segment landscapes into manageable units, vegetation health classification using K-Means clustering to determine irrigation needs, and Canopy Height Modeling (CHM) to assess vegetation structure. These efforts reduce water waste and promote sustainable water use, particularly in drought-prone areas, while collaborating with experts in urban planning and environmental science to scale these solutions.

Name: water4later
Description:
Bent u opzoek naar een oplossing om het hemelwater op te slaan? Dan bent u bij ons aan het juiste adres! Doormidden van een waterzak bieden wij de mogelijkheid om hemelwater op te slaan in kruipruimte en/of kelder.

Met kijk op het veranderde klimaat in de Nederland. We krijgen steeds vaker te maken met lange periodes van droogte die zich af wisselen met felle regen- en onweersbuien. In de periodes van droogte is er vaak een te kort aan water. Toch gebruiken we in deze periode het schaarse water, terwijl er in de natte periodes water in overvloed is. Om dit tegen te gaan vangen veel mensen het hemelwater op.

Een watertank neemt veel ruimte in beslag en is vaak een grote ingreep. Een ideale oplossing is dan ook een waterzak in het kruipruim van uw woning. Hier kunt u duizenden liters water opslaan zonder dat er kostbare ruimte verloren gaat. 

Het hemelwater wordt via het dak opgeslagen in de waterzak in het kruipruim. Op het moment dat u water nodig heeft voor bijvoorbeeld het sproeien van de tuin, het wassen van de auto of het draaien van de was, dan pompt u dit eenvoudig op uit de tank en u hoeft geen schaars drinkwater te gebruiken.

Nuestra Empresa cuenta además con el Laboratorio más antiguo Acreditado en analisis de aguas bajo la Norma ISO 17025 vigente, en el cual se realizan los análisis necesarios que son la base para nuestros diseños de equipos y Plantas de Tratamiento,
así como para que nuestros clientes estén enterados de la calidad de sus aguas.

ESPINSA trabaja también en la Potabilización de aguas de suministro para comunidades y fábricas, habiéndose desarrollado también en el Tratamiento de Aguas industriales y Aguas Negras.

EXPERIENCIA Y SERVICIO
La labor de mejoramiento continuo en la calidad de los servicios siempre ha estado presente como una política fundamental de la empresa. ESPINSA se esmera en llevar los datos técnicos de los análisis de cada equipo, presentando a sus clientes desde 1985, los parámetros que indican el estado de sus aguas, por medio de gráficas, incluyendo comentarios y recomendaciones pertinentes acerca de como mejorarlos, con el propósito de obtener agua de la mejor calidad para una determinada aplicación.

Los directores de ESPINSA están asociados a la American Water Works Association (AWWA), que es la asociación que aglutina a los profesionales del agua en Estados Unidos y a la WEF (Water Environmental Federation) entidad que une a todas las empresas dedicadas al tratamiento de aguas residuales.

Name: Bhujal App
Description:
Bhujal App is a user friendly IoT based multilingual android based solution and first of its kind developed globally exclusively for monitoring water levels in borewells/boreholes. It is a demand side solution for individuals, communities, institutions, commercial and industrial users having ground water borewells as their water resources. Bhujal App is the simplest technique and does not require any supporting tool/equipment to measure the water level or to remove the borewell assembly. It is the most cost-effective, decision making tool and befitting solution ever developed for ground water resource management for individuals and groups.Key features of Bhujal App includes

Online Digital Platform and Geotagging of Borewells

Bhujal, with its feature of geotagging of borewells offers online digital platform supported with data analytics and presentations for critical decision making for users for individual or collective monitoring of borewells and their regulation.

Measure water levels and performance of your borewell!

Bhujal helps you to determine water level in a borewell in an accurate manner. Water level in a borewell relates to its water quantity. Lower the water level less is the life of the well and vice versa. So use the App and start measuring life of your borewell and secure its sustained life. A sustained borewell can sustain life and prosperity!

Effective Management of your borewell!

You may be interested to know more about your precious water resource, its lifeline and impact of usage by you and others on its yield. Such information shall provide you greater insights into how you can improve your management of your water resource.

Get Reports and Alerts about your borewell!

Water Level History, Pump Operations History, Borewell Life and Surrounding Well Reports are the key reports available at a click in Bhujal for customised time periods. The reports present information in simplified yet innovative ways to facilitate easy understanding.

Name: Ένωση Δημοτικών Επιχειρήσεων Ύδρευσης-Αποχέτευσης
Description:
Η Ένωση Δημοτικών Επιχειρήσεων Ύδρευσης - Αποχέτευσης (Ε.Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.) ιδρύθηκε το 1989 με έδρα την Λάρισα και ξεκίνησε την λειτουργία της τον Ιανουάριο του 1990.Η Ε.Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. με τη δυναμική παρουσία της στο χώρο της Τοπικής Αυτοδιοίκησης, αλλά και του τομέα ύδρευσης-αποχέτευσης κατάφερε να αναγνωρισθεί επίσημα από την Πολιτεία, να καταξιωθεί και να αποτελεί συνομιλητή της Πολιτείας σε ζητήματα μείζονος σημασίας όπως είναι η διαχείριση των υδατικών πόρων της χώρας μας.

Σήμερα, η Ε.Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. εκπροσωπεί 118 Δημοτικές Επιχειρήσεις Ύδρευσης-Αποχέτευσης (Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.) σε σύνολο 126 περίπου Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. που λειτουργούν στην Ελλάδα και καλύπτουν με τις παρεχόμενες υπηρεσίες τους (ύδρευση - αποχέτευση - επεξεργασία λυμάτων) 5.222.077 κατοίκους. Οι δραστηριότητες της Ε.Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. επικεντρώνονται σε δύο τομείς:
1. Ο πρώτος αφορά στην εκπροσώπηση των Δ.Ε.Υ.Α., στον συντονισμό των ενεργειών τους και στην προβολή των αιτημάτων τους προς την Πολιτεία για ζητήματα ύδρευσης-αποχέτευσης.
2. Ο δεύτερος αφορά στην ενημέρωση, υποβοήθηση και στήριξη των Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. ώστε να βελτιώσουν την λειτουργία τους και κατά συνέπεια τις παρεχόμενες προς τους δημότες υπηρεσίες τους.

Καθώς βρισκόμαστε στις αρχές του 21ου αιώνα, η Ε.Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. θεωρεί ότι απαιτείται να εντατικοποιηθούν οι προσπάθειες για να διασφαλισθεί μία βιώσιμη υδατική πολιτική και για να ανταποκριθούν οι επιχειρήσεις ύδρευσης και αποχέτευσης στις προσδοκίες των καταναλωτών.
Σύμφωνα με τα παραπάνω, η Ε.Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. θεωρεί ότι η παροχή υπηρεσιών στον τομέα της ύδρευσης - αποχέτευσης θα πρέπει να πληροί τα παρακάτω κριτήρια:
- Να προστατεύει τη δημόσια υγεία
- Να σέβεται το περιβάλλον
- Να στηρίζει και να συμβάλει στην οικονομική ανάπτυξη
- Να εξασφαλίζει την κοινωνική αποδοχή

Our technology is built around high-efficiency nanobubble generation, enabling superior gas transfer (oxygen or ozone) directly into water. By combining this with real-time sensors, automation, and data analytics, we help operators optimize biological activity, reduce chemical use, lower energy consumption, and stabilize water processes.

Waboost solutions are designed for real-world deployment—from pilot projects to full-scale installations—and are used across:

Agriculture and irrigation systems
Lakes, lagoons, and environmental remediation
Process water optimization in food & industrial facilities
Industrial and municipal water & wastewater treatment
Aquaculture and fish/shrimp farming

Beyond hardware, Waboost delivers Smart Water as a Service through Waboost Cloud, enabling remote monitoring, performance tracking, and data-driven optimization over the full lifecycle of the system.

Our mission is simple:
replace chemicals with physics, inefficiency with intelligence, and complexity with measurable results.

Nanobubbles. Smart Water. Real Impact.

Advanced Hydrodynamic, Environmental & Sediment Modelling Services

We specialize in high-precision modelling and analysis for both coastal and inland water systems.

Our services encompass:

 Met-Ocean Analysis
Comprehensive assessment of meteorological and oceanographic parameters to support marine and coastal operations.

 Wave Hindcasting & Diffraction Modelling
Simulation of historical wave climates and interaction with structures for resilient coastal and offshore design.

 Tidal & River Hydrodynamic Modelling
Modelling of tidal and riverine flows to understand water movement, optimize infrastructure design, and assess flood risks.

 Flood Modelling
Advanced flood simulations in estuaries, tidal rivers, and inland basins for risk assessment and mitigation planning.

 Sediment Transport Modelling
Assessment of both cohesive and non-cohesive sediment dynamics in rivers, estuaries, reservoirs, and coastal zones.

 Reservoir Sedimentation Modelling
Detailed analysis of sediment deposition in reservoirs to support long-term water storage planning and desilting strategies.

 Dredge Disposal & Dispersion Modelling
Prediction of dredged material behavior for regulatory compliance and environmental protection.

 Advection-Dispersion & Contaminant Transport Modelling
Tracking of pollutant and nutrient pathways in surface waters for water quality management.

 Scour Analysis
Evaluation of scour around hydraulic and structural components in rivers and coastal settings.

 Hydraulic Force Analysis on Structures
Study of wave, tidal, and flow-induced forces on coastal and inland water infrastructure.

 Cyclone & Tsunami Modelling
Hazard assessment and early warning system support through extreme event scenario modelling.

 Hydrology & River Morphology Studies
Integrated catchment-scale hydrology and morphological modelling for flood  flood control and river management.

 Water Quality Modelling
Simulation of physio-bio-chemical processes

Name: 4th Joint WDSA/CCWI Conference 2026 @ Paphos,  Cyprus
Description:
We are pleased to announce the 4th International Conference on Water Distribution Systems Analysis & Computing and Control in the Water Industry (WDSA/CCWI).

The conference will take place at the Aliathon Resort in Paphos, Cyprus, between 18-21 May 2026.

The conference provides an excellent opportunity to experience a high-quality technical program while enjoying Cypriot hospitality.

This year’s conference is centered on the theme: “Designing the Next Generation of Urban Water and Wastewater Systems.” Through its technical program, it will offer a unique opportunity for the academic and industrial communities to formulate new challenges, share solutions, and discuss future research directions in smart urban drinking and wastewater systems.

We invite you to submit your work at WDSA/CCWI 2026. Authors with accepted abstracts will be eligible to submit a full paper to be published by a Scopus-indexed publisher with a DOI.

Name: Aquatim SA
Description:
Aquatim SA este operator regional al serviciilor de utilitate publică, de alimentare cu apă și canalizare, pe aria județului Timiș. Populația din aria de operare este de circa 570.000 locuitori. Activitatea societății este coordonată din Timișoara, operarea în județ fiind organizată prin cele 5 sucursale din Buziaș, Deta, Făget, Jimbolia și Sânnicolau Mare.

Acum mai bine de o sută de ani, inovația și progresul tehnic au marcat trecerea la sistemele moderne de apă în Timișoara. Astăzi, compania Aquatim este conectată la un viitor ce înseamnă modernizare permanentă şi servicii de cea mai bună calitate. Un pas strategic înainte pentru dezvoltarea infrastructurii a fost făcut în anii ’90, când Aquatim s-a orientat, la momentul potrivit, spre finanțarea investițiilor mari din programe cu fonduri nerambursabile. Timişoara a devenit astfel, în anul 2000, primul oraş din România cu branșamente de apă contorizate integral, în urma accesării unei finanțări de circa 12 milioane de dolari, din care 50% nerambursabili, prin Municipal Utilities Development Programme.
Prin Instrumentul pentru Politici Structurale de Pre-Aderare, Aquatim a beneficiat de 45 de milioane de Euro, bani europeni, din care 32 de milioane nerambursabili, cu care a retehnologizat complet, în anul 2011, staţia de epurare din Timișoara și a construit 17 km noi de rețea de canalizare.
Următoarele proiecte de anvergură au vizat dezvoltarea infrastructurii în județul Timiș. Prin Programul Operaţional Sectorial Mediu, Aquatim a asigurat o finanțare de 119 milioane de Euro din Fundul de Coeziune UE, pentru construirea a 300 km de rețele de apă şi canalizare, 7 staţii de epurare şi 3 staţii de tratare a apei în mai multe localități din județul Timiș.
În prezent, derulăm un proiect regional de investiții, de 239,5 milioane Euro (din care 180,4 milioane sunt fonduri nerambursabile) pentru realizarea unor sisteme durabile de apă și apă uzată, parte a Programului Operațional Infrastructură Mare.

Name: WOP Knowledge Hub Bangladesh
Description:
WOP Knowledge Hub Bangladesh is the knowledge platform of all Water Operators’ Partnership (WOP) projects and activities in Bangladesh. It is dedicated to capturing, sharing, and exchanging information and resources with national and international partners to accelerate the development of the water sector in Bangladesh. 

Bangladesh’s urgent need for water and sanitation improvements makes it a compelling case for WOPs to operate. WOPs have been proposed by utilities and their partners as a promising approach for improving the efficiency of water utilities. These partnerships are being used as a way of helping Bangladesh’s public operators to deliver adequate water and sanitation for all in a sustainable manner.

Our core vision is to collect the experiences and best practices from WOP projects all over Bangladesh. We hope this will be beneficial to water operators globally who are initiating similar partnership programs.

Name: Element15
Description:
"Developing water filtration systems for communities that provide clean drinking water without the need for energy." 

That is Element15’s mission. Currently, lots of countries are recovering from the impact that COVID had on their food and water supply. Recent events, such as the war in Ukraine and the ongoing droughts, for example in the Horn of Africa, have complicated this recovery. 

Generally speaking, one could conclude that climate change, environmental- and humanitarian disasters currently severely pressure the availability of clean drinking water and sustainable food supply. Element15, therefore, wishes to be part of the solution to help improve food security and clean drinking water supply, especially for the most vulnerable communities and individuals. 

In this light, Element15 has developed a low-cost, manually operated system that can create a sustainable supply of clean drinking water. The system consists of the BAR clean drinking water backpack and a treadle pump. 
 
To evaluate its impact, Element15 has translated its mission into measurable indicators based on the UN Sustainable Development Goals (see page SDG). These four indicators will help determining the impact that Element15 is making. They are tracked throughout the year and their impact will be shown in the annual report. Since these indicators will form the driving force behind Element15’s mission, future strategic decisions will therefore also be made with these indicators in mind.

Name: MELT WATER Inc.
Description:
At MELT WATER CLUB our mission is providing with sustainable, maintenance-free clean drinking water treatment. We recognize that access to clean water is a fundamental human right, yet over 2 billion people still lack access to safe drinking water, and millions of households worldwide rely on non-recyclable water filters. We are driven by the belief that our innovative solution can make a significant difference.

At MELT WATER CLUB, we are a team of dedicated individuals working towards a sustainable and cost-effective solution to address the global water crisis and provide a greener future for our planet. Our cutting-edge technology, the Freezing Process, can purify water from taps, lakes, rivers and seas in just 20 minutes, eliminating the need for non-recyclable and expensive filters or reverse osmosis. Our Melt Water Club units offer exceptional economic and functional advantages over existing technologies, making it a unique long-term sustainability investment product.

Name: Maverick Water Technologies
Description:
Maverick Water Technologies designs, manufactures, and installs advanced water disinfection and monitoring systems, specialising in chlorine gas and sodium hypochlorite treatment. Our solutions ensure effective, safe, and compliant water treatment across a wide range of sectors.

Our Products and Capabilities:

Chlorine Gas Dosing Systems:
We engineer and build complete chlorine gas dosing systems using our own proprietary chlorinator. These systems are skid-mounted for ease of installation and maintenance, featuring full PVC pipework assemblies and robust safety controls. Customers can choose between local or remote pump configurations depending on operational needs. Every system is fully customizable to match the specific requirements of the site, process, and regulatory compliance standards.

Sodium Hypochlorite Dosing Skids:
Our hypochlorite dosing systems are designed for precision and durability, featuring high-quality dosing pumps, flow control systems, and chemical-resistant pipework. Skids are modular and scalable, built with safety features and automation in mind for consistent disinfection performance.

Chemical Storage Solutions:
We supply bunded chemical storage tanks engineered for safe handling of sodium hypochlorite, compliant with all relevant chemical storage regulations. These tanks integrate seamlessly with our dosing systems to provide a complete, turnkey solution.

Instrumentation and Monitoring:
Our systems include real-time monitoring equipment—such as chlorine residual analysers, flow meters, and control panels—giving operators full visibility and control over the disinfection process. Remote access and automation options ensure efficient performance management and data tracking.

Typical Applications:

Municipal water treatment

Industrial water supply and treatment

Agricultural and irrigation systems

Name: Aquafarm
Description:
Eén van de grootste maatschappelijke opgaven van deze tijd is slimmer omgaan met grondstoffen en water, om ook in de toekomst voldoende kwalitatieve voedingsstoffen te kunnen produceren. 

Doorbraken ontstaan door anders naar hetzelfde te kijken. Zo is ook Aquafarm ontstaan. Aquafarm ziet de rijke stroom afvalwater als basis voor het produceren van hoogwaardige bouwstoffen. Want: waarom waardevolle grondstoffen uit het water verwijderen, als je deze ook kunt gebruiken om direct tot hoogwaardigere toepassingen te komen, met als eindproduct schoon water?

Met Aquafarm zoeken we in een praktijkgericht onderzoekstraject naar een nieuwe manier van afvalwater zuiveren. Met een geschakelde inzet van flora en fauna wordt het afvalwater zuiverder, willen we gifstoffen (zoals medicijnresten) verwijderen, én produceren we hoogwaardige stoffen. 

Initiatiefnemers van het project zijn Hoogheemraadschap Hollands Noorderkwartier, Hoogheemraadschap de Stichtse Rijnlanden en Waterschap Rivierenland, Wageningen Environmental Research, Radboud Universiteit en VanWaarde.

Name: Trees4Water
Description:
Trees4Water (2022.06375.PTDC), is a 18 months research project running from February 2023 to July 2024, financed by FCT (Fundação para a Ciência e Tecnologia, Portugal) through national founds. It is coordinated by the Centre for Molecular and Environmental Biology (CBMA), University of Minho, and has as partners the Centre for Ocean and Society, University of Kiel, Germany; the Centre for the Research and Technology of Agro-Environmental and Biological Sciences, University of Trás-os-Montes and Alto Douro and the water supply company Águas do Norte, S.A.

Trees4Water aims to evaluate the environmental effectiveness of the forestation scenarios (increase forest area and riparian forests), to improve the quality of the water (sediments, nitrates and phosphorus) by employing a comprehensive approach. This approach combines hydrological modeling by co-designing forestation scenarios (Task 1), and conducting cost-benefit analyses of these forest operations (Task 2) within two river basins located in northern Portugal: the Cávado and the Sabor. 

The overarching aim of Trees4Water is to develop a methodological framework that integrates natural and socio-economic sciences. This framework encompasses not only the evaluation of forests' biophysical functions in water quality improvement through modeling and landscape scenario management, but also the assessment of the social and economic costs and benefits associated with these management options. By the end, it is intended to create a collaborative investment model where water quality problems are evident.

Name: Eden Technologies Inc
Description:
Eden Technologies is developing the RO Centrifuge (ROC), a next-generation reverse osmosis platform engineered to solve RO’s biggest bottlenecks: high energy consumption, costly ultra-high-pressure (UHP) generation, and membrane scaling and fouling.

Traditional RO relies on large pumps to create pressure across membranes, and performance is often limited by energy intensity and membranes that clog as salts precipitate (scaling) or organics and solids accumulate (fouling). Eden’s RO Centrifuge uses centrifugal force to generate ultra-high effective pressure at the membrane, driving water through standard, off-the-shelf RO elements while changing how pressure is produced and applied. This enables a pathway to more efficient high-salinity separations and longer membrane runtime.

This breakthrough approach is poised to transform oil and gas produced water treatment, municipal desalination, mineral extraction and brine mining, where energy cost and membrane reliability determine what’s possible at scale.

Name: Torii Industries
Description:
As the world presses forward with sustainable and real time service strategies, the water heating industry is rooted in an unremarkable status quo with little change over the past 80 years. 

Consider a rigid purchasing platform that requires large sums of upfront cash/credit, a product life that rarely meets industry estimates, a substandard warranty offering with marginal protection, all coupled by a product that when it fails, it usually fails without warning, that can cause massive damage, and can take weeks to replace.  

The simple truth is the current industry doesn’t work very well for its customers as it contains a number of high-cost, high-risk scenarios. Yet it fails to include any of the needed cost-effective or proactive responsibility for an on-demand commodity as essential as hot water. New and better choices are needed.

Torii is reimagining hot water, blurring the lines of Fintech, Proptech, and Insurtech in the space of home water heaters. 

In the current industry model, water heaters are forgotten until they fail. Hot water as a service "hH₂OaaS" is a low-entry-cost subscription for high efficiency Torii water heaters. 

The patent-pending product is equipped with water quality and proprietary sensors for predictive analytics measured via wireless IoT, allowing it to be replaced before failure as a part of the subscription cost.

Name: FSC Soluciones de Ingeniería SAS (antes Ferrostaal)
Description:
Nacimos como Ferrostaal y evolucionamos a FSC Soluciones, con presencia en Colombia de más de 67 años.
En FSC hemos desarrollado tres (3) líneas de negocios que permiten brindar a nuestros clientes soluciones integrales en los diferentes procesos industriales de los sectores públicos y privados.
Brindamos Soluciones Hidráulicas para agua cruda, potable y residual con alta o baja carga de residuos. Nuestro alcance va desde la asesoría técnica, consultoría, diseño, suministro, instalación y puesta en marcha de los sistemas, siempre con un alto compromiso y calidad hacia nuestros clientes. Adicionalmente sistemas de bombeo, regulación y control de fluidos son esenciales en los sectores de saneamiento, plantas hidroeléctricas y el sector de la construcción en general.
Ofrecemos Soluciones Metalmecánicas y tenemos la capacidad de realizar el diseño, fabricación, suministro y montaje de estructuras metálicas para cualquier aplicación industrial a través de soluciones integrales para proyectos de ingeniería. Además, proveemos equipos especializados para el manejo de materiales a granel, sistemas de procesamiento de escombros de la construcción, equipos para mineras y clasificación de agregados, entre otros. Contamos con aliados estratégicos, extranjeros y nacionales, que nos permite brindar soluciones de vanguardia a la medida de las necesidades de nuestros clientes.
En FSC estamos comprometidos con el ambiente y sostenibilidad de los procesos industriales, por esto hemos creado la línea de Soluciones Ambientales brindando a nuestros clientes un portafolio integral con soluciones para el tratamiento de aguas, sistemas para control de olores y eficiencia energética.
Nuestros valores corporativos son: pasión, rentabilidad, confianza, respeto y franqueza. 
Contáctanos y cuéntanos tus proyectos!

- Agriculture & Horticulture (irrigation, pythium and algae control, aquaculture, hydroponics, plants health and growth enhancement)
- Wastewater treatment
- Lakes and Ponds remediation (algae control, fish health and growth enhancement, water cleaning)
- Food production (disinfection, freshness extension)
- Medicine (disinfection)
- Beauty (skin softening treatment)
- Mining
- Oil & Gas (cleaning, enrichment)

We significantly increased the efficiency of gas absorption and reduced the energy requirements of the process.

We believe that spread of nanobubbles technology around industrial world will significantly benefit in energy savings, ecological footprint and processes efficiency.

Name: Saltech Desalination
Description:
Welcome to Saltech - Your Solution for Desalination Systems in Africa!

Saltech specialises in providing cutting-edge desalination systems tailored to address Africa's water scarcity challenges. With a focus on sustainable solutions, we offer reliable RO (Reverse Osmosis) desalination systems designed to convert saltwater into Fresh drinkable water, ensuring water access and security for communities across the continent.

Our services include:

 - RO Desalination Systems: Our comprehensive range of seawater reverse osmosis desalination systems is designed to be simple, reliable, and efficient, delivering high-quality freshwater in harsh African environments.

 - Installation Expertise: With years of experience and a deep understanding of the African market, we offer expert installation services to ensure optimal performance and longevity of your desalination infrastructure.

 - Market Presence: Saltech has successfully installed desalination systems in Angola, Kenya, Mozambique, South Africa, Botswana, Namibia, and Tanzania, contributing to water security and economic development in these regions.

At Saltech, we are committed to supplying Africa with fresh drinking water, supporting sustainable development, and building resilience against water scarcity challenges. Join us in creating a water-secure future for Africa.

In dealing with Residential areas, one of the important things a homeowner needs to consider is water quality. Name: Airqua: Pure drinking water from air
Description:
Welcome to Airqua: Pure Drinking Water from Air.  We provide plug and play Atmospheric Water Generators that literally convert humidity in the air to pure healthy drinking water without plumbing or plastic. As easy to use as the tap but better for both people and planet. Using a system designed in Australia for Australian conditions our products produce pure fresh drinking water from the best source possible - the air (even when there is no rain). Plus we've added seven stages of purification ensuring removal of all chemical and biological contaminants including fluoride, lead, viruses, bacteria and more. Our water handily exceeds Australian drinking water standards and tastes great too!

Our energy efficient unit range includes counter top and floor standing designs with production ranges of up to 15L per day all the way up to 100L per day - with larger commercial solutions available - making them ideal for both homes and businesses. When coupled with solar power you will have an inexhaustible supply of water from an inexhaustible power source for maximum resiliency and independence as well.

Call or email us today for more information and a free consultation on what would work best for your needs.

Name: Hydritec Systems
Description:
Hydritec Systems est une société de conception, d’études et de réalisation de travaux clés en main, créée en 1994 par son actuel gérant, Thierry Ferrandon. Elle offre également des prestations de conseil, d’assistance technique dans des domaines hydrauliques très variés notamment : Arrosage Automatique, Brumisation Haute Pression, Epuration des Eaux, Désinfection des Eaux, Stations de Pompage  Irrigation Agricole.
Des ambitions internationales:
A travers sa société Hydritec International, Hydritec Systems a déjà participé à la réalisation de différents projets d’envergure (systèmes d’arrosage automatique, stations d’épuration…) et compte à son actif des références particulièrement significatives en Libye, au Maroc, en Nouvelle Calédonie .
Aujourd’hui Hydritec Systems vise à accélérer son développement sur de nouvelles destinations, telles que les pays du Grand Maghreb, les pays du Golfe, l’Afrique Sub-saharienne…
Historique :
• 1994 : Hydritec Systems voit le jour avec pour cœur de métier l'arrosage automatique
• 2000 : La société se diversifie et propose désormais l'installation de stations d'épuration des eaux usées, ainsi que la désinfection des eaux par ultra-violets
• 2004 : Une nouvelle technologie est lancée : la programmation de l'arrosage par système informatique
• 2006 : La brumisation vient compléter l'offre d'Hydritec Systems qui développe son savoir-faire à l'international
• 2008: Hydritec Systems obtient la réalisation de plusieurs projets de grande envergure en Tunisie
• 2010: La société exploite son savoir-faire dans le domaine agricole
• 2012: Intensification de l'action dans le domaine agricole par des missions d'expertise technique.
• 2014 : Concrétisation et réalisation de projets prestigieux  :
- Espace vert : Hôtels/ Mall of Sousse, Azur City, Technopole de Sousse, ZI Ennfidha, Perle du Lac, Ambassades...
- Bassin aquatique : Siège social de BIAT, plusieurs villas et propriétés..
- Agricole : Plusieurs propriétés agricoles en arboricultures

Name: wadi
Description:
Tous les jours, 40L d'eau potable sont gaspillés dans nos WCs ! Et si on changeait la donne ? 

L'eau est le parent pauvre de la transition écologique du bâtiment, alors que : 
- le prix de l'eau va augmenter de 50 à 75% dans les 5 années qui viennent (déjà +16% en 2 ans)
- l'habitat représente 25% de la consommation d'eau potable en France
- sur certains bassins versants, on va vers -40% de ressource d'ici 2040 et des coupures d'eau ou interdiction de permis de construire

En 2025, on a installé des dizaines de wadis dans des maisons individuelles et des immeubles, on a appris et on est prêts à accélérer. 

On cherche : 
- des professionnels du BTP qui veulent changer la d(eau)nne avec nous : plombiers, architectes, etc.
- des propriétaires engagés qui en ont marre de gâcher 40% de leur potable, tous les jours, dans leurs WCs

A AITASA tractem, transportem i distribuïm l’aigua que fa possible l’activitat del polígon petroquímic més gran del sud d’Europa.

I ho fem amb la mateixa filosofia amb què vam néixer fa 60 anys: gestionar l’aigua de la manera més eficient i sostenible possible.

Per això, subministrem a les nostres empreses usuàries aigua industrial i clorada, aigua desmineralitzada i aigua regenerada.

Tot amb un objectiu: crear un nou model d’indústria química al Camp de Tarragona, que la faci més competitiva i respectuosa amb el nostre entorn.


En AITASA tratamos, transportamos y distribuimos el agua que hace posible la actividad del mayor polígono petroquímico del sur de Europa.

Y lo hacemos con la misma filosofía que nos vio nacer hace 60 años: gestionar el agua de forma de la forma más eficiente y sostenible posible.

Por eso, abastecemos a nuestras empresas usuarias agua industrial y clorada, agua desmineralizada, y agua regenerada.

Todo con un objetivo: crear un nuevo modelo de industria química en el Camp de Tarragona, que la haga más competitiva y respetuosa con nuestro entorno.

এই সমস্যা সমাধানের লক্ষেই আমাদের আগমন ৷ আমরা আয়রন, সীসা ও ভাইরাস মুক্ত বিশুদ্ধ পানির প্রয়োজনীয়তা বুঝি এবং সেই কারণেই বাজারের সেরা মানের RO Water Purifier গুলি আপনাদের জন্য নিয়ে এসেছি ৷ 

বিশুদ্ধ পানির নিশ্চয়তা দেয়ার জন্য আমাদের পণ্যগুলি বাস্তব জীবনের বিভিন্ন পরিস্থিতিতে কঠোর পরীক্ষার মধ্য দিয়ে যায়। আমাদের পণ্যগুলো বিশ্বস্ত এবং আন্তর্জাতিক মানের কোম্পানি হতে উৎস, গুণমান এবং নির্ভরযোগ্যতা বিবেচনা করে বাজারজাত করি। বাংলাদেশের সেরা মানের এবং দামের ওয়াটার পিউরিফায়ারের জন্য আমরাই হতে আপনার বিশ্বস্ত সঙ্গী।

-Zero Energy Usage: Our pumps operate without external power, making them a cost-effective and sustainable alternative to traditional systems.

Follow us to learn more about sustainable water solutions.

Name: Wodociągi Słupsk sp. z o.o.
Description:
Założycielem Spółki z o.o. „Wodociągi Słupsk” jest Miasto Słupsk. W 1992 roku doszło do przekształcenia komunalnego Przedsiębiorstwa Wodociągów i Kanalizacji w Słupsku w spółkę z ograniczoną odpowiedzialnością – „Wodociągi Słupsk” sp. z o.o., która została wpisana do rejestru przedsiębiorstw.

Spółka działa w oparciu o przepisy Kodeksu Spółek Handlowych oraz na podstawie umowy Spółki. Od 2012 roku udziałowcem Spółki stała się Gmina Kobylnica. Aktualnie Słupsk – Miasto na Prawach Powiatu posiada w spółce 80,95% udziałów, zaś Gmina Kobylnica – 18,05%.

Misją Spółki jest zdrowie publiczne i satysfakcja odbiorców usług realizowane poprzez niezawodną dostawę czystej, zdrowej wody oraz niezawodny odbiór i oczyszczanie ścieków, w celu zapewnienia czystego i zdrowego środowiska naturalnego.

Wizją Spółki jest osiągnięcie najwyższych światowych standardów eksploatacyjnych i statusu firmy profesjonalnej, przyjaznej odbiorcom, dostawcom i środowisku, zrealizowane poprzez efektywne zarządzanie obiektami gospodarki wodno-ściekowej, rozumiane jako relacja jakości i niezawodności usług przy zachowaniu dbałości o akceptowalne społecznie koszty i transparentne działania.

Od 2017 r. Spółka pełni również rolę lidera Słupskiego Klastra Bioenergetycznego, który łączy lokalnych partnerów (m.in. samorządy, przedsiębiorstwa, spółki komunalne, producentów energii), dążących do rozwoju lokalnego, opartego na OZE rynku energii, wzmocnienia bezpieczeństwa energetycznego regionu i wsparcia transformacji w kierunku nisko- i zeroemisyjnej gospodarki.

To move from water scarcity to abundance, Elemental Water Makers enables affordable safe water from the sea & sun by awarded solar-powered desalination technology.

Already 4 billion people face a shortage of water. Because 97% of our water resources are salty, the key to access to more water lies in the sea. Desalination's nothing new, but is expensive, fossil fuel-intensive & complex. 

Elemental Water Makers provide extremely efficient solar desalination solutions to make affordable water using sustainable resources of the sea and sun. By unique Energy Recovery Technology, the desalination solutions use 70% less energy than conventional desalination technology and require 3x fewer solar panels. This major breakthrough enables an independent water supply for any coastal location. 

Elemental Water Makers is active in over 20 countries, providing desalination solutions that enable clean water for resorts, communities, industries, private properties, and governments. The average project results in 65% savings on the water bills. 

Elemental Water Makers also provides water resilience with portable desalination solutions for disaster relief and emergency response. The headquarter is based in The Netherlands and was founded in 2012. The company has received several prestigious international awards for its solutions and impact.  

Join us in solving fresh water scarcity, using only the sea, sun, earth & wind and contact us today at: 
http://elementalwatermakers.com/

Name: Voltea
Description:
At Voltea, our mission revolves around providing a superior solution to water reuse and desalination, where we put our natural resources and environment first. The lasting effects that harsh salts and chemicals have on our water sources is brutally evident, and only regressing with each salt refill and discharge using current traditional desalination and reuse technologies.

Environmentally responsible solutions to water reuse and desalination are crucial to our generation - and our future - and Voltea surpasses these expectations by providing a tunable, salt-free, chemical-free desalination technique that every home and business can adopt.

The tunability feature of Voltea’s Membrane Capacitive Deionization (CapDI) is what differentiates our technology from traditional desalination technologies; we allow treatment of brackish water sources where the customer can choose the level of salt and ion removal based on their treatment needs.

No longer is it necessary to replace removed salt with other salts, add chemicals for cleansing purposes, or cool then re-heat water for high-temperature reuse applications. CapDI accomplishes this all while reducing environmental impact, energy costs, and operational inefficiencies.

Name: FLOCEAN
Description:
FLOCEAN has a transformative approach to addressing global water scarcity. 

By harnessing the natural power and predictably clean water at depths of 300 to 600 meter, we provide freshwater directly from the ocean without the environmental burdens typical of traditional desalination methods. 

We specialize in developing, owning, and operating modular subsea (reverse osmosis) plants, from 5,000 m3/day to 50,000 m3/day, that utilize natural ocean pressure to reduce energy consumption by up to 50% compared to conventional desalination systems.

Our "Build-Own-Operate" (BOO) model delivers water as a service ensuring reliable, scalable, and cost-effective freshwater solutions to communities and industries across the globe. 

•	low cost (un-manned, low energy cost) 
•	eco-friendly (deep intake away from bioactive area and no chemicals or toxic brine discharge boosts ocean biodiversity)
•	high availability (storm resilient, unaffected by algal blooms)
•	increased physical security (natural protection)

Name: Clara Water AG
Description:
Clara Water AG ensures affordable safe drinking water for rural communities in Sub-Saharan Africa at just $0.10 per person per year.

THE PROBLEM: 

70–80% of water contamination happens AFTER collection, during transport and storage in jerry cans. Traditional treatment stops at the source. 95% of rural Ethiopians still lack safely managed drinking water. 

For decades, the development sector drilled wells and moved on, nobody was concerned with what happened after water reached households.

OUR SOLUTION: 

Clara produces disinfectant on-site from kitchen salt and solar energy, eliminating imported chemical supply chains entirely. 

Our system maintains Free Residual Chlorine that protects water for up to 12 hours after collection, solving the recontamination problem at the household level. 

Features include: AI-enabled chlorine dosing for precise automated treatment, remote monitoring accessible from anywhere, and scalable systems from 10 m³/day to 9,000 m³/day serving small communities up to entire towns.

WHY IT MATTERS:

Remote monitoring means NGOs and governments can track water quality in real time without sending expensive field teams. This data infrastructure supports results-based financing, carbon credit verification, and transparent donor reporting, proving impact, not just installations.

RESULTS: 

50,000+ people with safe water. E. coli reduced from 75% to 0% at household level. 83% of jerry cans maintaining sufficient residual chlorine. 

Systems operating 3+ years with 97%+ uptime.

CUSTOMERS: 

WaterAid, Catholic Relief Services, HEKS/EPER, Helvetas Intercooperation, Millennium Water Alliance, Ministry of Health of Ethiopia.

PARTNERS: 

Eawag, CSEM, Innosuisse, Aqua for All, Swiss Agency for Development and Cooperation.

Founded in Switzerland in 2023, operating in East Africa with local partners. 

Currently raising investment to scale impact across the region.

Ready to ensure safe water that lasts? Contact us at donato.patrissi@clara-water.ch

Name: Derwent Industries Pty Ltd
Description:
Derwent Industries is a 100% Australian owned and operated business and prides itself on providing its customers with products, service, and solutions to meet their expectations. The company is committed to a strong business relationship, which provides our customers with leading edge product, underpinned by our commitment to consistency, efficiency, and innovation. 

Clamps & Couplings - History
Derwent Clamps and Derwent Couplings have been added into the Derwent range with a new manufacturing facility being established in Wodonga - North East Victoria. The 316 Stainless Steel Clamps and Couplings trade under the Kawandah logo and have been developed for the Australian and export markets.

Derwent Foundry (Est. 1840)
Derwent Foundry was originally established in Hobart in 1840, though in the mid 1900’s the name was changed to Montpellier Foundry. Montpellier was then purchased in the mid 1980’s by Rex Garner and was re-established as Derwent Foundry. The Tasmanian Foundry was purchased by the Evans family in 1997. 

Bendigo Foundry
The Bendigo facility formerly Keech Castings currently produces a range of ground engaging tools, tillage implements, rolling stock components and custom casting products which are manufactured to Australian and ISO 9001 quality standards. 

Mackay Australia
Mackay was acquired by the Derwent Group in March 2023, Mackay commenced operations in 1932 as a small but efﬁcient supplier of OEM automotive parts, since this time Mackay has grown to become Australia’s largest and most trusted designer, manufacturer, and distributor of a diverse range of engineered rubber and rubber composite products. 

New Zealand
Derwent Industries NZ Ltd commenced operation in 2019,  in Auckland, adding to Derwent’s existing Australian footprint.

Mission Statement
To provide our customers with the highest quality product and professional service at all times whilst maintaining wherever possible Australian Made in our product offering.

Name: Irribiz
Description:

Our project portfolio is increasing daily, and providing solutions to some of the nations best growers is something we have not taken lightly. We work hard for our customers, and in return we get a fantastic product that we can be proud of and our customers can rely on.

By and large, we are an engineering projects company that will design, supply and install the mechanical, hydraulic, and pumping systems required for your specific requirements.

Irribiz is a Division of ICI Industries Pty Ltd

Somos guiados pela nossa missão de garantir água para a população: garantindo a eficiência, segurança e satisfação de nossos colaboradores, clientes e parceiros.

Name: Valley Irrigation Pakistan (Private), Limited
Description:
Valley Irrigation Pakistan (Private), Limited, represents Valmont Industries, Inc.’s “Valley” brand of center pivot and linear move sprinkler irrigation systems and has dealership rights in Pakistan.

Valmont’s “Valley” irrigation technology has changed the face of the earth.  Center Pivots and Linear Move Systems preserve our food supply, conserve our water, and make life easier and more profitable for those who grow our world’s food.

Valley center pivots were the first in the industry, and continue to remain the industry leader.  More than fifty years of engineering, testing, and grower feedback have helped us to create the pivots that we sell today.

In Pakistan: 

Since 2003, Valley Irrigation has campaigned throughout Pakistan to the Federal, Provincial, and District Governments and to Farmer Organizations and Individual Farmers to bring awareness of the High Efficiency Center Pivot Irrigation Technology to all Pakistani stakeholders of Food Production and Water Conservation.

Valley Irrigation is the first company to successfully deliver and install High Efficiency Mechanical Move Irrigation Systems in Pakistan. Valley Irrigation participates in every High Efficiency Irrigation Program in the Country and to date has installed 94 center pivot systems irrigating over 7,800 acres.

Name: Gamm-Bud

Another big part of our business is water supply and sewerage networks repair products. Name: WEBSAEID Engineering&Contract Solutions
Description:
