Name: Águas da Região Metropolitana de Maputo, SA
FIPAG
Description:
O FIPAG - Fundo de Investimento e Património do Abastecimento de Água é uma instituição pública de âmbito nacional, dotada de personalidade jurídica e autonomia administrativa, financeira e patrimonial tutelada pelo Ministério das Obras Públicas, Habitação e Recursos Hídricos.

PAPEL DO FIPAG
O FIPAG tem como papel agir em nome do estado, como interlocutor principal com o operador privado; gerir, de forma, eficiente e financeiramente viável, o programa de investimento público e privado nos sistemas de abastecimento de água que lhe forem confiadas; gerir os bens operacionais e de exploração afectos aos sistemas de abastecimento de água que lhe forem confiados a título transitório, entre outras.

MISSÃO
Promover o serviço de abastecimento de água nas principais cidades, através de uma gestão efectiva da participação do sector privado, realizando investimentos e usando património de uma forma eficiente e sustentável, promovendo tarifas justas e salvaguardando o meio ambiente.

VISÃO
Excelência na provisão de um serviço sustentável de Abastecimento de Água urbano, impulsionando o desenvolvimento do país.

Name: Hidroglobal
Description:
Hidroglobal ofrece soluciones integrales para todo el ciclo del agua, con uno de los portfolios más amplios y especializados del sector. Nuestra actividad se centra en el desarrollo, suministro y soporte de productos y sistemas destinados a una gestión eficiente, segura y sostenible del agua en sus distintas aplicaciones.

Operamos principalmente en tres mercados clave:
compañías de agua potable, sistemas de protección contra incendios e industria, donde aportamos soluciones para agua de proceso y aplicaciones industriales exigentes.

Abordamos todas las fases del ciclo del agua —captación, transporte, tratamiento, control y distribución— trabajando con agua potable, agua de proceso y agua residual, e incorporando también soluciones para agua salada en aplicaciones específicas.

Colaboramos estrechamente con compañías de agua, ingenierías, constructoras e industrias, ofreciendo un alto nivel de especialización técnica, fiabilidad de producto y una clara orientación al servicio y al acompañamiento del cliente. La confianza de los clientes más exigentes avala nuestra experiencia y nuestra capacidad para dar respuesta a los retos actuales del sector del agua.

Como empresa de MatHolding, grupo industrial internacional de referencia, Hidroglobal combina cercanía y conocimiento del mercado local con la solidez, la capacidad industrial y la visión a largo plazo de un gran grupo, impulsando la innovación y la mejora continua en la gestión del agua.

With a steadfast commitment to quality and innovation, we bridge the gap between world-renowned manufacturers and our local communities. Name: Alkimos Pipeline Alliance
Description:

This drinking water will integrate into our existing water network, securing supply to residents and business across Perth.
It will be the largest water pipeline Water Corporation has constructed, with a diameter of up to 1.6 metres. The Alkimos Pipeline Alliance will install 27.5 kilometres of this 33.5 km pipeline. Some sections have been constructed early as part of other transport infrastructure projects in Alkimos.

Name: Waterise
Description:
The Waterise subsea desalination plant uses components tested and demonstrated for years in both terrestrial desalination and subsea oil & gas systems. The plant combines the advantages of underwater desalination, mainly free hydrostatic pressure energy and very high-quality raw seawater supply, with the reliability and availability of a conventional plant, providing safe and clean access to fresh water in regions with water stress.

The solution consists of a design of standardized subsea modules with combined production capacity of 50,000 m3/day, manifolded together and connected to land by an umbilical cable that provides energy and communications, and a pipeline for the transport of fresh water to land. Economies of scale can be achieved by deploying multiple modules in the same site for greater production capacities.  

Waterise presents a unique value proposition to desalination clients around the world:
•	A big positive change for the environment
•	Significantly less energy consumption
•	Significantly reduced land usage
•	Lower water price
•	Very high reliability
•	Increased safety and security

Name: Yardney Water Filtration Systems
Description:
Since 1965 Yardney Water Filtration Systems has designed, engineered, and manufactured innovative water filtration solutions for the Irrigation, Golf, Turf, Landscape, Industrial, Commercial and Municipal markets worldwide. Yardney operates an Engineering Design, Research and Manufacturing facility in Riverside, California U.S.A. Our team is located throughout the United States, Mexico, and Europe in addition to strategic alliances that provide a global presence for Yardney.

Our manufacturing facility is U stamp certified by the American Society of Mechanical Engineers (ASME) to produce pressure vessels in both Carbon Steel and Stainless-Steel construction in addition to mainline pipe work, tie in pipe spools and automation packages for manual or automatic operation. Our products utilize a standard pressure rating or high pressure up to 144” in diameter and construction parameters can be custom tailored to your specifications and engineering requirements offering interior lining and paint options in NSF certified or non-certified options.

With an emphasis dedicated to water purification of Agriculture applications for the removal of suspended solids for low volume irrigation emission devices such as Micro Spray and Drip Tape for the reduction of water consumption and increased crop yield, Yardney expanded to the markets of Golf, Turf & Landscape. By the early 1980’s Yardney utilized its experience and knowledge to expand into the Industrial, Commercial and Municipal markets and applications.  Within these alternative markets the applications are segmented to applications including but not limited to Storm Water runoff, Environmental Cleanup and remediation, Pulp & Paper, Steel Mills, Cooling Towers, Dewatering, Agriculture Packing House wash water, Mining & Leaching, Oil & Gas, Prefilters for Reverse Osmosis/Ultraviolet and Dionized applications, Drinking water, Food & Beverage, Iron, Manganese, Arsenic, PFAS and more.

Name: AFM for Water & Waste Water Treatment
Description:
AFM Activated Filter Media is a direct replacement for sand and other natural filter media, doubling the performance of sand filters without the need of additional investments in infrastructure. AFM resists biofouling, biocoagulation and transient wormhole channeling of unfiltered water and outlasts all other filter media.

AFM is a highly engineered product manufactured from a specific glass type, processed to obtain the optimum particle size and shape. It is then exposed to a 3-step activation process to become self-sterilising and to acquire superior adsorption properties. During activation, the structure and the chemistry of the glass are modified.

Name: Blue Community Switzerland
Description: The Access to Water and Sanitation is a Human Right - and our Mission. Even then, the dispute over water was part of many people's everyday lives, and global warming has exacerbated the water shortage and thus the potential for conflict. The shortage primarily affects the poorest of the poor. Blue Communities recognize water as a public good. They pay attention to sustainable water management and work to ensure that water supply and use remain in public hands. They support other countries in providing a functioning public drinking water supply and in achieving sustainable water management. To this end, they maintain a long-term exchange of knowledge and experience with partners at home and abroad.

ברוכים הבאים לדף של AQUAPEA ISRAEL. כדורית הפלא המתקנת נזילות בצנרת מי שתיה ללא צורך בחפירות, חשיפה, הרס ולכלוך.
קבוצת מדענים מאנגליה חקרה כיצד להיטיב עם אנשים ואיכות חייהם וחיפשה תשובה לשאלה כיצד ניתן להמנע משבירת רצפות ומהרס בבית לצורך תיקון נזילות בצנרת מי השתיה. בשנת 2020 לאחר מחקרים וניסויים רבים הם מצאו את הפיתרון והמוצר החדשני הושק באנגליה ובארה"ב. למוצר קוראים AQUAPEA - כדורית בגודל אפונה המאפשרת תיקון נזילה בצנרת מי שתיה ללא חפירות, חשיפה, הרס ולכלוך.
נמצא כי ניתן להשתמש ב AQUAPEA בכל סוגי צנרת מי השתיה בקטרים של צנרת מ 15 מ"מ ועד 50 מ"מ ולדליפות בקצב 4 ועד 20 ליטר לדקה.
הטכנולוגיה המהפכנית של AQUAPEA זכתה בפרס החדשנות מאת מלכת אנגליה לשנת 2022. אושרה על ידי WRAS-תקן בריטי, NSF-תקן אמריקאי ובחודשים האחרונים אושרה על ידי מכון התקנים הישראלי לשימוש במי שתיה.
מוזמנים לתייג אינסטלטורים ואנשי מקצוע, ולהצטרף למהפכה בתחום תיקון צנרת ללא הרס יחד איתנו.

Ocion is a Canadian cleantech company leading the way in sustainable water treatment. We specialize in environmentally responsible solutions that protect water-based ecosystems from algae, bacteria, fungi, and certain insects without the use of harmful synthetic chemicals or chlorine.

At the core of our innovation is our proprietary Activated Ion Mineral (AIM) technology; a clean, organic approach that uses ionic forms of essential minerals to deliver effective, long-lasting biocidal action. By combining science with sustainability, Ocion is helping safeguard the world’s water through clean earth solutions. We're not just treating water, we’re protecting the future of our ecosystems.

Name: Oasis Tank
Description:
Bienvenido a la cuenta oficial de LinkedIn de Oasis Tank. 

Nacido en Costa Rica hace cinco años con la idea de transportar agua dulce en cualquier tipo de vehículo, Oasis Tank es un producto y una marca que busca abrir un camino en el mundo automotor y que surgió con la finalidad de proporcionar asistencia a cualquier vehículo que requiera el uso del agua durante un viaje o en un momento determinado.

Comenzó en el Caribe, ya que a raíz de las altas temperaturas y la naturaleza de su geografía, se imponía la necesidad de contar con un reservorio de agua dulce en los vehículos para mitigar los largos días de calor tanto para el trabajo como para el ocio. Fue justamente este concepto el que recogimos y decidimos implementarlo y expandirlo a otros escenarios como la montaña y el campo.

Nuestros tanques de agua están diseñados para adaptarse a cualquier vehículo con un sistema de racks de techo, con los accesorios de montaje y la integridad estructural.  Es la manera ideal de darle a su vehículo la capacidad de transportar el agua que necesita en ese viaje de aventura o después de practicar su deporte. 

A su vez, el tanque está diseñado para ser sencillo de instalar y utilizar. Así crea la manera más conveniente de transportar agua sin importar su lugar de destino y le da la capacidad de utilizarla fácilmente en el momento deseado. La conveniencia y facilidad de uso fueron puntos claves en el diseño de nuestros tanques.

Oasis Tank  hoy es la marca líder en este segmento, aportando su utilización a variadas actividades y necesidades: no es solamente un tanque de agua dulce, es, además, una herramienta para mucha gente que en determinadas circunstancias. El traslado de agua puede hacer la diferencia para su trabajo y también da lugar a la ayuda y la solidaridad que a veces puede llegar solamente de esta manera.

Their proprietary technology reduces energy consumption significantly, making it feasible to produce large volumes of potable water in an environmentally friendly manner. This scalable technology serves both small rural communities and large urban centers, ensuring universal access to clean water.

AquaPure Solutions is committed to environmental stewardship, focusing on minimizing ecological impact while providing essential water resources. The desalination systems are designed to have a lower carbon footprint and use less energy, aligning with global efforts to combat climate change. From its strategic base in Dubai, a region known for its challenging water supply issues, AquaPure Solutions aims to expand its reach globally. The company actively seeks partnerships with governments, NGOs, and other entities in water-stressed regions to tailor their technology for local needs, envisioning a world where clean water is not a luxury but a readily available resource for all.

Name: H2E
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2000, H2E a fait le choix de l’innovation et de la proximité. Implantée sur le Parc d’activités de Lezoux, près de Clermont-Ferrand, la société s’est développée autour d’un seul fil conducteur : L’EAU.
Nous avons développé depuis plus de 20 ans un savoir-faire technique organisé autour de 3 pôles : les piscines collectives, les réseaux d’eau et les douches filiformes. 
Nous intervenons essentiellement dans le domaine du traitement et de la filtration de l’eau des piscines collectives, c’est-à-dire les centres thermaux, les balnéothérapies, les bassins de rééducation, les piscines municipales, les campings et hôtels… Nos compétences s’étendent du dimensionnement des équipements à l’installation, la maintenance et le dépannage des appareils présents dans les locaux techniques (pompes, filtres, régulations, déchloraminateurs…). 
Notre 2e pôle est celui du traitement de l’eau des réseaux (eau potable, ECS…), notamment dans la lutte contre la légionnelle dans le secteur médical et paramédical. Nous proposons également des solutions de Re-use avec ultrafiltration… 
Enfin, nous avons développé des douches filiformes sur-mesure pour les hôpitaux et services de rééducation des grands brûlés. 
Notre secteur géographique privilégié est la région Auvergne Rhône Alpes et les départements limitrophes (Cher, Nièvre, Corrèze, Saône et Loire, Creuse…) et nous sommes amenés à nous déplacer sur tout le territoire ponctuellement.

Name: LiqReserve
Description:
About LiqReserve

LiqReserve is India’s first AI + IoT + Blockchain–enabled B2B Marketplace and Digital Water Infrastructure, transforming how businesses and cities buy, sell, and manage water.

We connect factories, builders, corporates, and municipal bodies with verified water suppliers through a secure, transparent, and technology-driven ecosystem — ensuring sustainability, traceability, and accountability in every transaction.

Unlike traditional water suppliers or listings, LiqReserve combines a digital marketplace with an infrastructure intelligence layer — building the foundation for India’s next-generation water grid.

What Makes Us Unique

 Escrow-Based Payments: Secure and guaranteed transactions between buyers and suppliers.

 Blockchain Transparency: Immutable and tamper-proof trade records for complete visibility.

 GPS + IoT Tracking: Real-time tanker monitoring, smart metering, and verified delivery validation.

 AI-Powered Intelligence: Dynamic pricing, consumption forecasting, and optimized logistics.

 ESG Performance Dashboard: Helps corporates track sustainability metrics and ensure compliance.

 CO₂ Credit Monetization: Converts verified water savings and carbon reductions into tradable ESG credits.

 Our Mission

To build India’s Digital Water Infrastructure by uniting technology, industry, and sustainability — eliminating inefficiencies, empowering verified suppliers, and creating a transparent, data-driven water economy.

 Our Vision

To make every drop of water traceable, tradable, and sustainable, while establishing LiqReserve as the global “UPI for Water” — a trusted digital backbone for sustainable water management across India, the UAE, and beyond.

Name: AquoLiber Systems
Description:
Water is life. Water is freedom.
But for millions of people, water is still trapped: in unreachable infrastructures, in aging pipelines, in the distance that separates communities from a vital resource.
At AquoLiber Systems, we believe water should know no borders. It should flow free, clean, and safe to every corner of our country. We were born with a clear mission: to democratize access to water, freeing it from contaminants and from the infrastructure barriers that prevent it from reaching those who need it most.
Our commitment is to the people—to rural, urban, and coastal communities, to the families who dream of a fairer tomorrow. We know that water is not a privilege: it is a right.
That is why at AquoLiber Systems we promote decentralized, reliable, and sustainable solutions that make possible what once seemed impossible: delivering safe drinking water where it had never reached before, and returning it to nature free of pollutants.
As the exclusive representative in Mexico of Boreal Light GmbH and its Winture technology, we provide water treatment, desalination, and purification systems powered by clean energy—designed to operate without dependence on electrical grids or complex infrastructure.
Every drop we deliver is more than water: it is opportunity, health, and hope.
We believe in a future where no one has to wonder if the water they drink is safe. A future where water flows free.
AquoLiber Systems. Free water. Borderless water. Water that flows for all.

Name: IWA Young Water Professionals - Tanzania
Description:
The IWA Young Water Professionals (YWP) Tanzania Chapter exists to empower, develop, and elevate the next generation of leaders shaping Tanzania’s water future. Our mission is to cultivate a highly skilled, informed, and influential community of young professionals equipped to drive national priorities and contribute meaningfully to global water agendas.

We focus on accelerating professional growth through leadership development, technical capacity building, mentorship, and exposure to innovative, data-driven, and sustainable solutions tailored to Tanzania’s water sector challenges.

The Chapter serves as a dynamic platform for fresh perspectives, creativity, and forward-thinking problem-solving—ensuring the water sector remains adaptive, inclusive, and future-ready.

Through collaboration, innovation, and leadership, the IWA YWP Tanzania Chapter is shaping the professionals who will define the future of water in Tanzania and beyond.
Our Goals:
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹𝗼𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁: Building a technically competent and future-ready cadre of young water professionals equipped to solve Tanzania’s pressing water and sanitation challenges.
𝗡𝗲𝘁𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗢𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀: Creating strong, cross-sectoral connections that link young professionals with policymakers, industry leaders, and institutions to drive coordinated national water action.
𝗔𝗱𝘃𝗼𝗰𝗮𝗰𝘆 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗔𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀: Amplifying the voice of young water professionals in policy and decision-making to shape inclusive, forward-looking water governance.
𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁: Mobilising young professionals to advance water literacy, gender-inclusive leadership, and sustainable practices aligned with Vision 2030 and the SDGs.

Name: Consorzio di Bonifica della Sardegna Centrale
Description:
Le attività del Consorzio, innumerevoli, sono finalizzate alla razionale utilizzazione delle risorse idriche per uso agricolo ed alla salvaguardia dell’ambiente rurale e comprendono, in estrema sintesi, la manutenzione e gestione degli impianti pubblici di bonifica (reti irrigue e di scolo), l’attuazione delle opere pubbliche allo stesso affidate dalla Regione Sardegna e/o dallo Stato (dalla progettazione al collaudo).

Nell’ambito del sistema della Protezione Civile regionale, il Consorzio svolge le funzioni di Presidio Territoriale assegnategli dalla legge: a seguito di appositi Accordi di Programma stipulati con l’Amministrazione Regionale svolge inoltre, fin dal 2012, per conto del Servizio del Genio Civile di Nuoro, le attività inerenti al ‘servizio di piena e intervento idraulico’ nonché di  ‘presidio territoriale’ su alcuni corsi d’acqua di competenza regionale.

Numerose sono anche le collaborazioni con varie Amministrazioni Pubbliche  per la realizzazione di azioni di comune interesse ed il perseguimento di obiettivi comuni, nell’ambito delle rispettive finalità istituzionali.

Tutte le attività vengono svolte dalla struttura tecnica, amministrativa e gestionale del Consorzio che si avvale, limitatamente alla realizzazione delle opere pubbliche ed agli interventi manutentivi di maggiore entità, di ditte esterne specializzate appositamente selezionate.

Welcome to Mango Floater – Revolutionizing Pump Solutions
At Mango Floater, we bring innovation and reliability to the world of submersible and openwell pumps. Our patented floaters are designed to reduce maintenance costs, improve efficiency, and provide long-term durability for farmers and industrial operators. With a focus on rust-free, UV-resistant, and lightweight solutions, Mango Floater is changing the way pumps operate, making them more efficient and hassle-free.
Why Choose Mango Floater?
1. Maintenance-Free Solution
Say goodbye to constant repairs and high maintenance. Mango Floater’s durable design ensures your pumps stay efficient and functional without frequent upkeep.

2. Rust-Proof & UV-Stabilized
Our floaters are made from premium materials that resist rust and UV damage, ensuring longevity in all types of conditions, especially for outdoor use.

3. Cost-Effective
Mango Floater saves you time and money. By reducing the need for frequent repairs and replacements, you can focus on productivity, not maintenance.

4. Patented Innovation
Our patented technology is specifically designed to enhance pump performance and reduce wear and tear, providing you with a product that stands out in the market.

Key Benefits of Mango Floater
Rust-Proof Technology for long-lasting performance. UV-Stabilized Materials to withstand outdoor exposure. Lightweight and Easy Installation for simple plug-and-play use. Cost Savings by reducing maintenance and replacement costs.
Customer Success Stories

Farmers and industrial users across the country trust Mango Floater for its reliability and durability. Here’s what some of them have to say:

“Mango Floater transformed the way we manage our pumps. No more frequent repairs, and it’s been a huge time saver!” – Sunil Jadhav, Farmer, Maharashtra

“We’ve significantly reduced pump maintenance costs thanks to Mango Floater’s rust-free design. It’s the best investment we’ve made.” – Ajay Kumar, Factory Owner, Pune

Description:
BEber Salud se especializa en ofrecer purificadores de agua de última generación que mejoran la salud al eliminar contaminantes y remineralizar el agua. Sus sistemas de ósmosis inversa no solo eliminan bacterias, metales pesados y microplásticos, sino que también alcalinizan el agua y la enriquecen con minerales esenciales como calcio y magnesio. Además, estos equipos son compactos y eficientes, ayudando a reducir el consumo de botellas plásticas y promoviendo la sostenibilidad ambiental.

El agua purificada por BEber Salud mejora el sabor y el olor del agua, eliminando residuos químicos y metales pesados. Al tener un pH equilibrado y propiedades antioxidantes, el agua de Beber Salud contribuye a una hidratación adecuada, lo que es crucial para el funcionamiento óptimo del cuerpo, mejorando la digestión, la apariencia de la piel y el sistema inmunológico.

Los purificadores de BEber Salud también son ideales para empresas, ya que proporcionan un suministro constante de agua pura, fomentando un ambiente de trabajo saludable y reduciendo el estrés al facilitar la hidratación continua de los empleados.

Name: De Blois Watertechnologie B.V.
Description:
Welkom bij De Blois Watertechnologie B.V., opgericht door Gert-Jan de Blois. 

Als technisch specialist en innovator op het gebied van duurzaam waterbeheer ontwikkelen wij sinds 2015 oplossingen die bijdragen aan een toekomst waarin waterbeheer efficiënt, duurzaam en innovatief wordt uitgevoerd — met de kracht van zonne-energie.

Wij combineren technische expertise met een open en analytische benadering. Uw vraag staat bij ons centraal! Altijd nieuwsgierig, opzoek naar de kern van een probleem, en gericht op innovatie buiten bestaande kaders. Complexe vraagstukken zien wij niet als obstakel, maar als kans om te vernieuwen.

Binnen onze projecten staan betrouwbaarheid, duurzaamheid en effectiviteit centraal. Wij ontwerpen en realiseren peilbeheer- en pompsystemen op zonne-energie voor landbouw, natuurbeheer en overheden.

Onze werkwijze kenmerkt zich door:

 Een analytische en toekomstgerichte aanpak
 Diepgaande technische kennis en praktische oplossingen
 Het vermogen om vanuit een top-down visie te denken en te handelen
 Innovatie met impact – technologie die werkt én bijdraagt aan een beter milieu

Bij De Blois Watertechnologie B.V. geloven we dat echte innovatie ontstaat uit nieuwsgierigheid, visie en vakmanschap. Daarom blijven we bouwen aan duurzame oplossingen die het verschil maken voor mens, natuur en economie.

 Pioniers in duurzaam peilbeheer
 Gespecialiseerd in zonne-energiesystemen voor waterbeheer

 La gestió de l'aigua és el repte més important que afronta la humanitat en els pròxims anys. Les sequeres, el canvi climàtic o l'augment de la població mundial fan perillar les reserves d'aigua del planeta. Per a evitar que això passi, només hi ha dos camins que han d'anar de bracet: innovació i gestió eficient dels recursos.

A Abastaments d'aigua del Tordera som conscients del moment crucial en el qual ens trobem, per això estem centrats en continuar millorant tots els processos, des de la captació de l'aigua fins a la distribució, passant per la potabilització i el transport.

Així, amb aquests objectius ben clars, els nostres serveis s'enfoquen a fer de la gestió de l'aigua un repte ambiciós i no un problema:

 Manteniment de les instal·lacions d'aigua potable
 Control de la qualitat de l'aigua potable
 Ús de noves tecnologies per al control centralitzat
 Propostes de millores en les instal·lacions
 Facturació i atenció al client
 Control dels consums elèctrics i de cabal
 Digitalització i anàlisi del comportament de les xarxes
 Control de fuites

Si vols saber com podem millorar la gestió de l'aigua del teu poble o ciutat, contacta amb nosaltres.

 Abono mensual flexible: incluye envío, instalación, cambio de filtros, mantenimiento técnico y atención personalizada.

 Hogares: sin cargas pesadas ni almacenamiento de bidones. Ideal para familias, personas mayores o quienes cuidan su salud.

 Empresas: soluciones prácticas para salas de espera, comedores, oficinas y equipos de trabajo. Mejorás la experiencia del personal, reducís costos logísticos y mostrás compromiso con el bienestar.

 Certificados por ANMAT
 Más de 40 años de experiencia como especialistas en agua
 Cobertura en CABA, GBA y La Plata
 Atención cercana, profesional y sin letra chica

Nuestro propósito es claro: hacer del agua segura un derecho cotidiano, promoviendo hábitos saludables y sostenibles.

Description: Kangen Water... (aka electrolyzed reduced water (ERW), or hydrogen water) begins as tap water. The Enagic machine filters out chlorine and other impurities from the tap water, then separates the hydrogen and oxygen with a process known as electrolysis. Description:
Uni-Tech Drilling

Over 30 years of drilling experience with extensive capabilities, proven to meet our customers commercial drilling requirements

Image of drill rig
Trusted Professionals
Uni-Tech Drilling maintains an extensive set of drilling services serving the northeast (NJ, NY, PA, DE, MD). Uni-Tech has the capacity, equipment, and expertise necessary to satisfy all of your drilling and subsurface exploration requirements. Our team is dedicated to providing you with reliable, personalized service that is unmatched in the drilling industry.

Here for All Your Drilling Needs
When it comes to drilling; you name it, we can do it! Services include soil borings, rock coring, groundwater sampling, low clearance, public water supply wells, commercial water wells, barge drilling, mud rotary, air rotary, hollow stem augering, direct push, pump work, galvanic cathodic protection, and well rehabilitation to name a few.

We also install submersible and vertical turbine pumps from 1/2 HP to 300 HP. Our team works on water or land, drilling small or large diameter holes as needed.






Drill rig with uni-tech and flag

To complete each job, we utilize a wide range of specialized equipment, including direct push machines, low clearance rigs, mud rigs, hollow stem auger rigs, barges and much more for all types of geotechnical and environmental work. Geotechnical work consists of soil borings for the design of new dams, bridges, and buildings. Environmental work consists of monitoring wells, extraction wells, groundwater samples, soil vapor points, and the like.

Name: Sipra Mineral Water
Description:
SIPRA House of Minerals is a mineral water brand under Sumbul Enterprises that is striving to be the first choice for quality conscious consumers who wish to experience superior, safe, and healthy drinking water that meets international standards at an affordable price.

To provide every citizen of Pakistan with premium, clean and safe drinking water, without compromising on health in an affordable manner. We believe that uncontaminated drinking water is a basic human necessity that should be accessible to all, regardless of financial background and any other kind of discriminatory difference.

SIPRA has been approved by various food regulating bodies such as:
Pakistan Standard and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)
Pakistan Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (PCSIR)
The Aga Khan Laboratories

SIPRA was awarded the Pakistan Standard and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) license for maintaining and providing pure, safe, and healthy drinking water to all individuals.

Every employee under SIPRA House of Minerals follows a strict regime of sanitation and hygiene practices even before stepping into the facility and the same is maintained while monitoring SIPRA’s state of the art elaborate Reverse Osmosis Purification Process.

SIPRA boasts its routine testing conducted in its well-equipped chemical and bacteriological laboratory at various points before, during, and after the entire purification process. SIPRA adopts the safety standards defined by Pakistan Standard and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) and World Health.

13-Step Purification Process
SIPRA House of Minerals is the only bottled mineral water brand in Pakistan, where raw water undergoes demineralization, following a thirteen-step purification process including (but not limited to):

Special Ultraviolet Filtration
Remineralization
Ozonation Treatments

Description:
مؤسسة عبدالواحد المهجع للمقاولات

تعد مؤسسة عبدالواحد المهجع للمقاولات المتخصصة في البنية التحتية والصرف الصحي والمباني السكنية وغير السكنية من المؤسسات الحيوية التي تسهم في تطوير المدن وتحسين جودة الحياة. تهدف المؤسسة إلى تقديم حلول متكاملة في مجال الإنشاءات والبنية التحتية، وضمان أعلى مستويات الجودة والسلامة، والالتزام بالجدول الزمني، وتحقيق رضا العملاء.

الخدمات:

	•	البنية التحتية: تصميم وتنفيذ شبكات الطرق والجسور، وشبكات المياه والكهرباء والاتصالات، وتطوير المناطق الحضرية.
	•	الصرف الصحي: بناء محطات معالجة مياه الصرف الصحي، وتصميم وتنفيذ شبكات الصرف الصحي، وصيانة وتحديث البنية التحتية.
	•	المباني السكنية: تطوير المجمعات السكنية، وتصميم وبناء الفلل والوحدات السكنية، وترميم وتجديد المباني القديمة.
	•	المباني غير السكنية: إنشاء المكاتب التجارية، وبناء المدارس والمستشفيات، وتطوير المشاريع السياحية والفندقية.

الخبرات والفريق:

	•	الخبرات: سنوات طويلة من الخبرة في تنفيذ المشاريع الكبرى والمعقدة، واستخدام أحدث التقنيات.
	•	الفريق: فريق عمل متخصص يتكون من مهندسين وفنيين مؤهلين، ودعم من طاقم إداري محترف.

الابتكار والتطوير:

	•	الاستثمار في التكنولوجيا الحديثة لتحسين جودة وسرعة التنفيذ.
	•	تطبيق معايير الاستدامة البيئية في جميع المشاريع.
	•	تقديم حلول مخصصة تلبي احتياجات العملاء.

الشهادات والاعتمادات:

	•	الحصول على شهادات الجودة العالمية مثل ISO.
	•	الاعتماد من الجهات الحكومية المحلية والدولية.

المشاريع الناجحة:

	•	تنفيذ مشاريع بنية تحتية كبرى في المناطق الحضرية.
	•	إنشاء مجمعات سكنية متكاملة بمواصفات عالية.
	•	بناء مرافق عامة تلبي احتياجات المجتمع.

تسعى مؤسسة عبدالواحد المهجع للمقاولات إلى أن تكون رائدة في قطاع المقاولات والإنشاءات، وتحظى بثقة العملاء بفضل التزامها بالجودة والابتكار.

Name: MIDAS-WASH
Description:
The Matthews Institute for Development and Sustainability (MIDAS-WASH) is an African-led think tank advancing water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) systems transformation across the continent. Rooted in context-specific research, capacity building, and sector governance, MIDAS-WASH exists to strengthen sustainable, locally managed water and sanitation solutions in Africa.

Aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals and Africa's Agenda 2063, our work is grounded in evidence, equity, and ecosystem thinking. We drive systems-based sector governance, train the next generation of WASH leaders and technicians, conduct water quality monitoring for water security, and generate evidence to influence decision-making from the community to the global stage.

Our pillars include:
WASH Sector Governance
Technical & Institutional Capacity Building
Water Quality Research & Monitoring
Water Security, and 
Advocacy and Systems Strengthening

We believe Africa holds the blueprint for resilient, self-reliant water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) systems, and we are here to build it.

O prazo de duração indeterminado, e se rege pela da Lei das Sociedades por Ações, Lei n° 6.404/76, de 15 de dezembro de 1976, a qual foi modificada pela Lei n° 11.638, de 28 de dezembro de 2007, Lei 13.303, de 30 de Junho de 2016 e  pelo seu Estatuto. Nosso capital total está distribuído em Ações Ordinárias (com direito a voto) e Preferenciais (sem direito a voto), onde  99,98% das ações ordinárias pertencem ao Governo do Estado da Paraíba e 0,02% estão distribuídos em 471 sócios entre pessoas físicas e jurídicas.

Name: North Carolina Water Company
Description:
At NC Water Company, we believe that clean, safe, and soft water is essential—not a luxury. Serving homes across North Carolina, our mission is to transform every household’s water experience through integrity, innovation, and customer-first service.

What we do
We offer comprehensive, whole-home water solutions tailored to your needs:
	•	Whole-house water softening to remove scale-causing minerals
	•	Whole-house filtration systems to eliminate chlorine, heavy metals, and other contaminants
	•	Ultra-purified drinking water systems (RO) for crystal-clear water straight from your tap
	•	Expert design & installation backed by industry knowledge and care

We begin each engagement with a complimentary in-home water test—evaluating hardness, chlorine levels, and other key indicators—to show you exactly what’s in your water before recommending solutions.  

Why we’re different
	•	Accountability you can trust: We commit to what we promise and ensure every job is done right—even if it means cutting into sheetrock to access main plumbing—and we restore surfaces to “brand new” before we leave.
	•	No pressure sales: Our approach is consultative—our goal is educating homeowners and delivering tangible results.
	•	Proven results: Homeowners routinely report noticeable improvements in water clarity, softness (in hair and skin), reduced soap use, and longer lifespan for appliances.
	•	Accessible & affordable: We work throughout the Triangle (Durham, Raleigh, Wake Forest, Garner, and beyond) and make sure high-quality water solutions are within reach.

Our promise
Every family deserves to feel confident in the quality of their water. From your morning coffee to your evening shower, we ensure it’s not just “good enough”—we make it exceptional.

Name: EcoClean Technology Sdn Bhd
Description:
EcoClean Technology Sdn. Bhd. was established in the year 2000 to improve the quality of water in rivers & water bodies and to also combat water pollution caused by aggressive development. We are the sole Malaysian Licensee to manufacture and supply Continuous Deflective Separation (CDS) since 2000 and CleansAll Gross Pollutant Traps (GPT’s) since 2014 encompassing Malaysia, Singapore, Brunei and China. From humble beginnings, we now carry a wide range of products to meet the ever-growing demand of the industry.

With over 20 years of experience, we are able to provide our expertise and service in designing, supplying and installation of a wide range of products to suit your needs and requirements. The following are some of the products which we are able to offer:
•	CDS Gross Pollutant Traps
•	CleansAll Gross Pollutant Traps
•	EcoSac
•	Rainwater Harvesting System (EnviroModule)
•	On-site Detention System (EnviroModule)
•	Storm water & Grey water Treatment System
•	CDS Waste water / Sullage water Treatment System
•	Filternator
•	Drainage Cells
•	E/One Low Pressure Sewer System
•	Combined Sewer Overflow (CSO)
•	Soilless Vertical Garden & Green Roof
•	Bio-Swale
•	Aquaponic System

We are proud to proclaim that our CDS and CleansAll Gross Pollutant Traps are 100% compliant based on the Urban Stormwater Management Manual (MSMA) for Malaysia. In addition, we have also previously obtained a supporting letter from Department of Irrigation and Drainage, Malaysia (JPS) for our CDS and Cleansall Gross Pollutant Trap further reinforcing the effectiveness of our product.

EcoClean Technology Sdn Bhd is also a member of several associations such as Malaysia-China Chamber of Commerce, Association of Environment Consultant and Companies of Malaysia (AECCOM) as well as Malaysia Stormwater Organisation.

We strive to provide excellent service to all our clients in the field of Storm water, Waste water and Sullage water Treatment, Rainwater Conservation and Green Technology.

Les Chouchous d’Esa vous apportent toutes les solutions pour récupérer l'eau (de pluie, de forage d'un puits, d'une source, ...) et des moyens pour la stocker, la filtrer, la traiter et la potabiliser. 

Parce que ESA sont les initiales de Eau, Soleil et Air nous proposons également des équipements pour décontaminer de l'air par photocatalyse ou plasma froid et des équipements solaires.

L’eau est notre richesse et nous devons limiter sa pollution et son gaspillage. 
 
Nos familles de produits : 
-Récupération d'eau de pluie : citernes souples, citernes à enterrer, récupérateurs hors sol.
-Filtration, potabilisation et traitement de l'eau par ultraviolets : lampes, gaines, générateurs UV-C. 
Traitement de l'eau : pompes, gestionnaire d’eau, anticalcaire,... Economiser l’eau : éco-mousseurs, ...
-Limiter la pollution de l'eau : laver son linge sans lessive, microfibres pour l'entretien de la maison et des locaux professionnels.

ESA Evolutions, une entreprise Normande au service de l'eau.

Name: SIALA
Description:
SIALA (Servicios Industriales y Acarreos de la Laguna) es una empresa dedicada a la purificación de agua mediante el proceso de ósmosis inversa. Contamos con tanques de acero inoxidable grado alimenticio para poder conservar la pureza y calidad de nuestro producto. Ofrecemos 3 tipos de servicios: 1) agua de pozo limpia, 2) agua suave (ósmosis primer paso) y 3) agua desmineralizada (ósmosis segundo paso). 

Adicionalmente, contamos con el servicio de agua para construcción, ofreciendo la modalidad de carga en sitio. Buscamos asegurar la capacidad productiva de diferentes tipos de industrias como lo es la alimenticia, maquilas, construcción y plazas comerciales, suministrando +200,000 litros cada día en los estados de Nuevo León, Coahuila y Durango. Nos distinguimos por nuestra experiencia (+300 millones de litros transportados), calidad (realizamos monitoreo constante), compromiso (atendemos los 365 días del año) y seguridad (nuestras unidades están monitoreadas las 24 hrs vía GPS).

Podemos resolver diferentes problemas:
- Suministro de agua potable.
- Evitar daño a tuberías, calderas, piezas de metal, ropa, entre otros por presencia de sales.
- Aumento de producción debido a la cantidad limitada de agua que ofrece la red de la ciudad.
- Suministro en caso de emergencias como cortes de agua, cortes de luz, fallo de equipos, entre otros.

Que no le falte agua a tu empresa! Solicita ahora una cotización.

Name: Silvertex USA
Description:
Silvertex is a 3-dimensional textile fabric with a defined proportion of wet-chemically silver-coated threads. Silvertex effectively protects drinking water, process water and technical liquids from contamination. It has an antimicrobial effect by reducing germ growth and microbiological growth over time in the reservoir and in the entire pipe system. This process is called the oligodynamic effect and describes the damaging effect of metal cations on pathogens and bacteria. Thanks to the self-dosing properties of Silvertex and the fact that it can be used for up to 12 months ,the water now can stay in a hygienically flawless state for up to 6 months.

The possible use cases of Silvertex are extensive: it can be used both stationary and mobile. In the mobile application, Silvertex is suitable in any utilization in which water needs to be stored due to the constant change of location or self-sufficiency. This includes all road, air, water, and rail vehicles with water storage capabilities such as RVs, planes, trains, or e.g., food trucks. In stationary use, Silvertex can preserve not only stored water in tanks or process water in industry (e.g., cooling circuits), but is also successfully used in plant construction, for the operation of air washers, air humidifiers or in water treatment systems and wherever water needs to be protected from microbiological contamination.

Silvertex in standard product versions is suitable for different tank sizes up to 300 gallons (1200 liters) and preserves up to 16000 gallons (60000 liters) of water. In combining the Silvertex standard product versions basically all tank sizes can be covered.

Name: Municipal Water Supply and Sewerage Company of Syros
Description:
Η ίδρυση της επιχείρησης (σαν Δ.Ε.Υ.Α. Ερμούπολης), έγινε με το Π.Δ 14/31-01-97(ΦΕΚ Αριθ. Φύλλου 13/14-02-97). Με απόφαση της Αποκεντρωμένης Διοίκησης Αιγαίου (ΦΕΚ 2725/18-11-11) σαν περιοχή αρμοδιότητας της επιχείρησης ορίστηκε η διοικητική περιφέρεια του Δήμου Σύρου-Ερμούπολης και μετονομάστηκε σε Δημοτική Επιχείρηση Ύδρευσης Αποχέτευσης Σύρου (Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.Σ.).

Η Δημοτική Επιχείρηση Ύδρευσης και Αποχέτευσης Συρου (Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.Σ.) είναι νομικό πρόσωπο ιδιωτικού δικαίου με κοινωφελή – μη κερδοσκοπικό χαρακτήρα – και διέπεται ως προς την οργάνωση, διοίκηση, την εκτέλεση, λειτουργία και συντήρηση των έργων της αρμοδιότητας της από τις διατάξεις του Ν.1069/80 «περί κινήτρων δια την ίδρυσιν επιχειρήσεων υδρεύσεως και αποχετεύσεως».

Αποκλειστικός σκοπός, κατά τις διατάξεις του προαναφερόμενου νόμου είναι η μελέτη, κατασκευή, συντήρηση, εκμετάλλευση, διοίκηση και λειτουργία των δικτύων ύδρευσης και αποχέτευσης ακαθάρτων και όμβριων υδάτων, καθώς και μονάδων για την επεξεργασία νερού και λυμάτων της Σύρου.

Το νερό του δικτύου της Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.Σ. στο μεγαλύτερο ποσοστό του προέρχεται από την αφαλάτωση θαλασσινού νερού. Η ετήσια παραγωγή νερού φθάνει τα 2.000.000 κυβικά μέτρα περίπου. Η αφαλάτωση πραγματοποιείται στο εργοστάσιο αφαλάτωσης της Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.Σ. στην περιοχή Αγ. Δημητρίου στην Ερμούπολη και στις μονάδες αφαλάτωσης που βρίσκονται στην Βάρη, στην Ποσειδωνία, στο Κίνι και στον Γαλησσά.

Οι παροχές ύδρευσης της Δ.Ε.Υ.Α.Σ. ανέρχονται σε 18.500 υδρόμετρα περίπου, σε όλο το νησί.

Από τις αρχές του 2000 λειτουργεί στην περιοχή Λαζαρέττα ο Βιολογικός καθαρισμός, ο οποίος περιλαμβάνει πλήρη επεξεργασία υγρών και βιολογικής ιλύος και καλύπτει τις ανάγκες της πόλης της Ερμούπολης, του οικισμού της Άνω Σύρου, καθώς και των περιοχών του Κινίου, του Μάννα και της Αζολίμνου.

Από το 2022 λειτουργεί και η νέα μονάδα Βιολογικού καθαρισμού, επίσης στα Λαζαρέττα, η οποία καλύπτει τις ανάγκες της Βάρης, του Μ. Γυαλού και μέρους της Αζολίμνου.

Name: Δημοτική Επιχείρηση Ύδρευσης Αποχέτευσης Χαλκίδας
Description:
Σκοπός της ΔΕΥΑΧ είναι η παροχή πόσιμου ύδατος στους δημότες αλλά και η διαχείριση (συλλογή, μεταφορά και επεξεργασία) των ακαθάρτων υδάτων όλων των δημοτικών ενοτήτων του Δήμου Χαλκιδέων. Ευθύνη της επιχείρησης αποτελεί και η διευθέτηση της όδευσης των ομβρίων υδάτων όλων των οικισμών, καθώς και οι επιμέρους αρμοδιότητες (λειτουργίας, επίβλεψης, κατασκευής κ.α.) που κατά καιρούς αναλαμβάνει, βάσει προγραμματικών συμβάσεων με άλλους φορείς .

Η ΔΕΥΑΧ παρέχει στο πολίτη της Χαλκίδας στη μεγαλύτερη έκταση του Δήμου, νερό πολύ καλής ποιότητας και ποσότητας, μέσα από ένα δίκτυο ύδρευσης που ικανοποιεί 100% τις ανάγκες των δημοτών .Νέα έργα βελτίωσης υδροληψιών σε ποσοτική διάθεση του νερού είναι σε εξέλιξη, ειδικά σε οικισμούς του Καλλικρατικού Δήμου με βασική προτεραιότητα το σχεδιασμό, τη μελέτη και τη κάλυψη όλων των μελλοντικών αναγκών της πόλης.

Το δίκτυο αποχέτευσης ακαθάρτων υδάτων (οικιακά λύματα) σήμερα καλύπτει τουλάχιστον το 75% της έκτασης των πόλεων της Χαλκίδας και της Ν.Αρτάκης με προοπτική επέκτασης και στις άλλες Δημοτικές Ενότητες . Λόγω του ανάγλυφου της περιοχής έχουν κατασκευασθεί πλέον των 30 αντλιοστασίων ακαθάρτων, που κατευθύνουν σταδιακά τα λύματα για την επεξεργασία τους στη μονάδα επεξεργασίας λυμάτων με την ονομασία Κέντρο Λυμάτων Χαλκίδας (Κ.Λ.Χ.) και στον Βιολογικό Καθαρισμό της Νέας Αρτάκης (ΒΙΟΚΑ).

Όλες οι δραστηριότητες της ΔΕΥΑΧ και ιδιαίτερα αυτές που αποσκοπούν στην εξυπηρέτηση των πολιτών, τελούν υπό διαπιστευμένες διαδικασίες. Αρχή της επιχείρησης αποτελεί η συνεχής βελτίωση των παρεχόμενων υπηρεσιών και η εγκατάσταση Συστήματος Διαχείρισης Ποιότητας στην ΔΕΥΑΧ κατά το πρότυπο ISO 9001:2008, θεωρούμε ότι εξυπηρετεί αυτή την αρχή.

Name: Agrio Solutions
Description:
In Ghana, over 70% of the agricultural workforce are smallholder farmers. And yet, only 13% of cultivated land is irrigated, leaving most farmers vulnerable to climate shocks like drought and unreliable rainfall.

Irrigation is vital at the early stages of crop development and the absence of it destroys farms, decreases yield output and traps farmers in poverty. For farmers who pursue manual irrigation, high diesel costs and the labor intensity of mañual irrigation further limit their ability to farm year-round, resulting in low yields, food insecurity, and stagnant income.
 
Agrio provides solar irrigation pumps (SIPs) and sustainable land-and-water use advisory for smallholder farmers (SHFs). Agrio purchases and rents SIPs on a metered pay-per-use basis to SHFs with no need for upfront cost or reliance on fossil fuel like diesel pumps - making it well suited for rural settings. By promoting widespread adoption of SIPs, Agrio increases farmer yield, transform livelihoods and promotes sustainable agriculture.

Name: RondomRegenwater
Description:
Samen bouwen aan een wereld waar regenwater niet verspild wordt, maar efficiënt wordt benut.  Dat is waar ons bedrijf voor staat! 

We richten ons op het creëren van innovatieve systemen en oplossingen om dit waardevolle natuurlijke water op te vangen, indien nodig te te behandelen en vervolgens te hergebruiken voor diverse toepassingen.

Drinkwater wordt steeds kostbaarder vanwege klimaatverandering en speelt een essentiële rol voor menselijk leven en ecosystemen. 

Rondom Regenwater zorgt voor een scheiding in gebruik van drinkwater en regenwater. Ons toegewijde team van experts zorgen ervoor dat de waterhuishouding op orde is. Voor particulier, bedrijf en overheid.

Hergebruik van regenwater is niet alleen duurzaam, het bespaart ook kosten.
Bijvoorbeeld voor het wassen van ramen, het besproeien van de tuin en doorspoelen van toilet. 

Onze regenwaterhergebruiksystemen en onderdelen zoals regenwatertanks van kunststof of beton, filters en pompen, leidingen en distributiesystemen, terugslapkleppen en overloopbeveiligingen zijn innovatief en van hoge kwaliteit. 

Wij behandelen het opgevangen water met UV-filters, of we desinfecteren het. Nieuwe technieken zoals omgekeerde osmose worden ook toegepast.. Behandelingen zijn afhankelijk van de gewenste waterkwaliteit.

Naast het opvangen van regenwater plaatsen wij ook waterinfiltratiesystemen. Bij infiltratie wordt het regenwater op een gecontroleerde manier de bodem in geleid en voorkomt verspilling.

Regenwaterinfiltratie wordt toegepast voor grondwateraanvulling, overstromingspreventie, verbeteren van de bodemvochtigheid, waterzuivering en vertraging van regenwaterafvoer.

Een belangrijk product van waterinfiltratie zijn infiltratiekratten. Deze zijn gemaakt van duurzaam kunststof en leverbaar in verschillende diktes. Welke toegepast wordt hangt af van de grondsoort zoals klei, zand of veen. 

Wij zijn partner voor infrabedrijven, groenbedrijven en grondbedrijven voor regenwateropvang en infiltratiesystemen.

WRE Laboratory merupakan fasilitas akademik dan penelitian di Departemen Teknik Pengairan Universitas Brawijaya yang berfungsi sebagai pusat inovasi, penelitian, dan Praktikum. Laboratorium ini mendukung mahasiswa dan peneliti dalam studi terkait berbagai bidang  dalam pengelolaan sumber daya air.

Visi
Mewujudkan laboratorium sebagai wadah pemberdayaan mahasiswa dalam penelitian, inovasi, dan pengembangan keilmuan di bidang teknik pengairan guna mendukung pengelolaan sumber daya air yang berkelanjutan

Misi
Menyediakan lingkungan laboratorium yang mendukung keunggulan akademik, inovasi penelitian, dan solusi rekayasa praktis untuk pengelolaan sumber daya air yang berkelanjutan.

WRE Laboratory terdiri dari 7 laboratorium utama yang mendukung berbagai aspek teknik pengairan, yaitu:
1 Laboratorium Hidrolika Dasar – Mempelajari prinsip dasar hidrolika dan aliran fluida.
2 Laboratorium Hidrolika Terapan – Menganalisis dan menerapkan konsep hidrolika dalam struktur dan sistem teknik pengairan.
3 Laboratorium Hidrologi – Meneliti siklus hidrologi, curah hujan, aliran permukaan, dan pemodelan hidrologi.
4 Laboratorium Teknik Sungai – Mengembangkan teknik pengelolaan sungai, pengendalian banjir, dan restorasi ekosistem sungai.
5 Laboratorium Tanah dan Air Tanah – Menganalisis sifat tanah, interaksi air tanah, serta dampaknya terhadap struktur teknik pengairan.
6 Laboratorium Perencanaan Bangunan Air – Merancang dan mengevaluasi bangunan air seperti bendungan, irigasi, dan saluran drainase.
7 Laboratorium Pengelolaan Sumber Daya Air Terpadu – Mengkaji strategi pengelolaan sumber daya air yang berkelanjutan dan berbasis ekosistem.

 Kegiatan Kami
- Mendukung proyek akademik dan penelitian
- Melaksanakan praktikum yang terdapat dalam mata kuliah terkait
- Menyelenggarakan pelatihan serta workshop terkait keilmuan di bidang  Teknik Pengairan
- Berkolaborasi dengan industri dan lembaga pemerintah dalam proyek terkait sumber daya air

Nuestra visión se alinea con los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible (ODS) de la ONU, con especial enfoque en el objetivo número 6: "Agua limpia y saneamiento". Nos esforzamos por implementar soluciones innovadoras y tecnológicamente avanzadas que aseguren el suministro de agua de alta calidad y sostenibilidad en cada etapa del ciclo del agua.

Además, estamos comprometidos con la conservación y gestión eficiente del agua, desarrollando prácticas que no solo satisfacen las demandas actuales, sino que también protegen este recurso vital para el futuro. En Aguas Buchen, la sostenibilidad no es solo un compromiso; es la esencia de nuestro negocio.

Description:
THE SPECIALIST IN FINDING HIGH-YIELD FRESH WATER SOURCES
There is not enough water in every region. But transporting water to remote areas is expensive and also not always possible. Therefore, a water well is often a very reasonable alternative to find water in the immediate vicinity. And this is exactly where we at Eco Solution are a strong and reliable partner - worldwide. 

WE FIND WATER WORLDWIDE ...
... for industry and manufacturing companies (e.g. beverage producers), private and public water procurement associations, agriculture as well as for private individuals and find water sources nearby.

WATER SELF-SUFFICENCY AND SECURE WATER SUPPLY
For many areas on this planet a safe and independent water supply is of existential importance, but often hardly feasible. ECO Solution offers its customers a low-cost solution to this problem. Compared to other options like desalination plants, dams or water transport over long distances, our offer is very reasonable. For, among others, the following areas with high water demand and consistently high water quality, we are an ideal service provider to achieve water self-sufficiency or to supplement existing water sources at low cost.

FOR WHAT WE STAND:
- Over 95% success rate for water well exploration missions
- 2-day rapid water discovery based on proven scientific methods
- Well exploration in hard-to-reach areas (granite, hills, deserts)
- Finding water where your previous contractors abandoned
- Less paperwork, more field work for significant cost savings
- Guaranteed well capacity - if discovered well capacity decreases by more than 30% within 3 years of service completion - we will restart on-site drilling or find new well locations within a 1km area.

The LFC is a Golden Solution for water utilities as it will solve the meters'
inefficiency at low flows. Once the LFC is installed to the water
meter, the meter will be able to measure every water drop.

The LFC helps solving:
1. Revenues losses to water utilities Utilities are losing Millions of Dollars in revenues annually for water supplied but unmeasured and therefore
unbilled.
2. Property damages from leaks undetected leaks damage walls and floors, therefore causing huge renovation costs.
3. Water waste undetected leaks causes huge water waste.
4. Capex issues for utilities as meters age they become less reliable, and the utilities are replacing them due time and must invest frequently on new
water meters.

The first generation will help save water waste as consumers will get higher bills when the have leaks and they will address them.

The company currently works on developing the second generation, The
Smart LFC . The future generation will send real-time alerts to the utilities and end consumers on leaks.

Name: Purifico
Description:
Purifico offers a unique family of stationary and mobile ozone systems that provide water disinfection, cleaning and aeration. We are a specialized ozone provider uniquely focused on agricultural industries, providing clean and chemical-free water to facilities and fields of all sizes. Purifico products are designed for ease of use and simple installation by providing turnkey, stand-alone systems. With over a decade of expertise, we provide solutions to the unique challenges of rough agricultural environments with high-volume water treatment demands.

Industry professionals understand the benefits of ozone as a safe, natural disinfection tool that can replace traditional, harsh, or inefficient disinfection products. Ozone is a natural disinfectant used in the greenhouse, winery, dairy, poultry, and livestock industries that produces a more desirable product through the control of bacteria, molds, and other microbes. Now, more than ever, water is becoming a precious resource that needs to be protected.  As legislation introduces requirements for water re-use and clean disposal, operations need to focus energy and resources into this key ingredient. Having pure, clean water simply makes sense. Purifico is poised to partner with you in finding solutions for your water treatment needs.

Description:
شرکت صنایع نوید موتور در سال 1375 تاسیس شد. ماموریت این شرکت که سایت کارخانه آن در 35 کیلومتری شهر تبریز در شهرک صنعتی سلیمی واقع است ساخت و تولید الکتروموتورهای صنعتی و خانگی و مخصوص طبق سفارش مشتری تعریف شده بود.
 در سال 1385 همکاری نوید موتور با شرکت صنایع پمپیران برای تولید پمپهای فشار قوی آغاز شد. با بازبینی ماموریت و چشم انداز نوید موتور در سال 1386 نوید موتور برای استفاده از مزیت رقابتی تولید الکتروموتور برای تولید الکتروپمپ باعث شد تا یک همکاری استراتژیک با شرکت صنایع پمپ سمنان انرژی برای تولید پمپهای سیرکولاتور خطی آغاز شود.
 این همکاری تا ادغام این دو شرکت در سال 1389 ادامه داشت و از آن پس این شرکت صنایع نوید موتور بود که کار تولید و بازارسازی محصولات سیرکولاتور با برند سمنان انرژی را ادامه داد.
 در سال 1391 با هدف انسجام فعالیت تحقیقات بازار و بازارسازی، واحد توسعه بازار نوید موتور تاسیس شد تا این شرکت را به سمت آرمان آن یعنی تبدیل شدن به بزرگترین تولید کننده و عرضه کننده الکتروپمپ های ساختمانی در بازار ایران و منطقه هدایت کند. مجموعه این فعالیت ها به بهینه سازی محصولات آبگرم و همچنین ارتقا نسل الکتروپمپ های سیرکولاتور آبگرد منجر شده است.
 هم اکنون برای تکمیل سبد محصولات ساختمانی الکتروپمپهای زمینی سیرکولاتور و آبرسانی اتابلوک در خط تولید قرار گرفته است و برای سال های پیش رو تحقیقات بازار برای کشف نیاز مشتریان ادامه دارد و در آینده نزدیک شاهد اولین سری پمپهای تقویت فشار خانگی خواهیم بود. شرکت صنایع نوید موتور در کنار تولید محصولات و ارئه راه حل به مشتریان به ارائه خدمات صنعتی به سایر شرکت ها و تولیدکنندگان نیز می پردازد؛
 خدمات وایرکات با ماشین سی. ان. سی. جهت برش فولاد، آلومینیم، مس، تنگستن و کارباید، ساخت قالبهای برشی پروگرسیو، ماشینکاری تمام اتوماتیک قطعات با ماشین های پیشرفته، طراحی و ساخت انواع قالب های دایکست و تزریق پلاستیک و تولید ورق های لامینیشن برای سایر سازندگان الکتروموتور از این نوع خدمات صنعتی است.

Name: TriaSun–sustainable water purification
Description:
TriaSun is a greentech start-up, developing a system for zero-emission water desalination/purification,which utilizes 100% on-site renewable energy:
›Design and construction in Scandinavia - Europe.
›Possibilities for installation inAustralia,on the Caribbean & Pacific islandsandin the coastal regions ofthe Mediterranean,Africa,CaliforniaandChile.

In a sunny arid climate,only solar energy is used.
In cloudy areas,the system uses solar energy,combined with wind power or geothermal energy.

A TriaSun unit has a very low maintenance requirement,as it functions without membranes and with few mechanical parts.The system has a long service life,of up to 50 years(if maintained every two to four years).

When used for desalination,the TriaSun system provides the environmental benefit of being entirely brine-free:all the produced natural salt is harvested and dried.The system operates without any brine discharge.TriaSunʼs operations will therefore be fully respective of the marine environment–which is especially important in coastal locations.

A TriaSun installation is energy-neutral and is operated on a stand-alone basis;it generates all the clean energy needed by itself and it is remotely steered through telemetry.Daily operation is largely automated,which renders this system suitable for usage in -amongst others- remote desert locations near the seashore.

› For applications in seawater desalination,water inlets can be located along the coastline.
› For applications in groundwater desalination,water inlets can be positioned underground,as part of salinity remediation schemes.

Our range of services includes:
› sustainable water treatment
› ecological water purification
› water cycle management
› water recycling

Status
› Stage A:prototype design & simulation modellingwas completed in 2022.
› Stage B:prototype engineering & construction begins in 2023.
› Stage C:industrial manufacturing in standard series starts in 2024.

Name: H2oEliteLabs
Description:
H2oElite provides a specifically designed Magnetic and Electric Field with a high-speed pulse wave
on a variety of pipe sizes and materials in Residential, Commercial and Industrial applications.

The problems created by hard water have short and long term damaging effects on Residential, Commercial and Industrial communities alike. Our chemical free systems not only eliminate problems associated with hard water such as scale build-up and corrosion, but does so while eliminating chemicals, saving water, time and money.

How it works?
The magnetic field creates Nano bubbles (surface diameter less than a micron) that coats the inside of the pipe and doesn’t allow scale to form.The magnetic field also creates a mechanical component by pulsing the signal 25 times a second. The signal breaks down existing scale over time and allows it to pass through the pipes. As hard water particles are removed from existing pipes the water pressure will increase and help to remove existing scale and stop new scale build up on pipes, heating elements, and any other surfaces,coming into contact with this water.

Our Products are the world's most powerful and cost-effective Electronic Water Conditioners on the market today. H2oEliteLabs will solve scale problems with No Salt, No Chemicals or Maintenance.

Name: AQUASENSE
Description:
À propos de Aquasense

Aquasense est une entreprise spécialisée dans la production d'eau potable à partir de l'air ambiant. Notre technologie innovante permet de capter l'humidité de l'air pour la transformer en eau pure, propre et accessible, même dans les environnements les plus arides. Vision :

Devenir le leader mondial de la production d'eau atmosphérique, en offrant une solution écologique aux enjeux globaux de l'eau.

 Valeurs :

Durabilité : Préserver les ressources naturelles en utilisant l'air comme source d'eau.

Autonomie : Offrir des solutions indépendantes des infrastructures classiques.

Innovation : Développer des technologies de pointe pour capter l'humidité de l'air efficacement.

Résilience : Apporter de l'eau potable même dans les zones les plus difficiles d'accès.

 Technologie :

Aquasense utilise un procédé unique de condensation atmosphérique, optimisé pour capter les micro-particules d'humidité présentes dans l'air. Avec un rendement exceptionnel, nos générateurs produisent de l'eau potable même dans des conditions climatiques défavorables.

 Impact environnemental et social :

Réduction de la dépendance aux infrastructures classiques

Apport d'eau potable dans les zones arides

Autonomie hydrique pour les communautés isolées

 Partenariats stratégiques :

Nous collaborons avec des ONG, des gouvernements locaux et des industriels pour déployer nos solutions dans les régions en crise hydrique.

Name: Transient Detect
Description:
TD.Cloud (a SpiralData spinout) is a software company with embedded machine learning (ML) algorithms that has been validated by SA Water and SE Water through multiple trials for over 2 years in Australia. TD.Cloud has a series of proprietary algorithms that find, identify and mitigate rapid changes in pressure within pipes (pressure transients) caused by a variety of disturbances; pumps, valves, customers, leaks and breaks. 

Pressure transients occur at high speed in water networks resulting in >60% of leaks and breaks. Global losses of $39B affect reliability, operational costs and investment. There is significant value in solving fast moving pressure transients to reduce fatigue, leaks and breaks. Current market approaches are unable to transmit high speed sensor data due to the data volume as they are fast moving and therefore sampled at >100Hz. TD.Cloud ingests data from high speed pressure data loggers into our algorithms with a web-facing interface for end users and/or APIs for outputs to be ingested into corporate systems.

Name: Climate Resilience in Kosovo Water Sector
Description:
Climate Resilience in the Water Sector of Kosovo (CRWSK) is a SECO-financed project implemented by EBP (Switzerland) and KIWER (Kosovo). The project works with Regional Water Companies, ministries, regulators, and professional associations to strengthen the climate resilience of Kosovo’s water sector by tackling systemic challenges in Non-Revenue Water (NRW), Energy Efficiency (EE), and Renewable Energy (RE).
 Our mission is to ensure that water utilities and institutions are better equipped to adapt to climate change, safeguard scarce resources, and deliver sustainable services. By reducing water losses, improving energy efficiency, and integrating renewable energy, CRWSK helps utilities enhance operational and financial performance while reducing greenhouse gas emissions.
 Key activities include technical and financial assessments of all Regional Water Companies, development of water balance and energy audits, creation of NRW and EE/RE strategies, and piloting quick-win investments in pumping station optimization, smart metering, and renewable energy solutions. The project also introduces a Performance-Based Subsidy Scheme (PBSS), linking financial support to measurable improvements through robust KPIs.
 Partners and stakeholders include the Ministry of Economy, the Ministry of Environment, the Kosovo Energy Efficiency Fund (KEEF), professional associations such as SHUKOS and the Young Water Professionals, and the donor community. CRWSK builds capacity through training, tandem approaches, and awareness campaigns, ensuring that improvements are sustainable and widely adopted across the sector.
 Expected impact: resilient and efficient utilities, reduced water losses, lower energy costs, enhanced financial sustainability, and a modernized institutional framework aligned with international best practices.

Name: Wodociągi Białostockie Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Wodociągi Białostockie prowadzą działalność w zakresie ujmowania, uzdatniania, zbiorowego zaopatrzenia w wodę oraz zbiorowego odprowadzenia i oczyszczania ścieków na terenie miasta Białystok i gminy Wasilków. Ponadto spółka prowadzi hurtową sprzedaż wody i hurtowy odbiór ścieków dla gmin ościennych: Supraśl, Juchnowiec Kościelny, Choroszcz, Dobrzyniewo i Zabłudów.

Wodociągi Białostockie eksploatują ujęcia wody: powierzchniowe, infiltracyjne i podziemne w Wasilkowie oraz podziemne w Jurowcach. Po jakościowej "obróbce"  w pobliskich stacjach uzdatniania, woda jest dostarczana do odbiorców siecią wodociągową o długości około 1200 km (wraz z podłączeniami). Z tej sieci korzysta obecnie 99% mieszkańców. Ścieki są odbierane i odprowadzane do oczyszczalni siecią kanalizacyjną o długości około 700 km (razem z przyłączami). W ten sposób nieczystości pozbywa się aktualnie 98% ogółu mieszkańców.   

Znajdujemy się w krajowej czołówce branży wodociągowo-kanalizacyjnej, co jest wynikiem wieloletniego doświadczenia połączonego z rozwojem innowacyjnym i technicznym. Wodociągi Białostockie opracowały i wdrożyły m.in. nowatorską w kraju metodę układania światłowodów w kanałach ściekowych.

Spółka systematycznie doskonali wdrożony w 2006 roku Zintegrowany System Zarządzania wg odpowiednich norm: system zarządzania jakością, system zarządzania środowiskowego oraz system zarządzania bezpieczeństwem i higieną pracy.

Zasadniczym celem działalności Wodociągów Białostockich, przedsiębiorstwa z ponad 130-letnią historią, jest satysfakcja mieszkańców. Realizujemy go poprzez nowoczesne standardy zarządzania, wysoki poziom kompetencji i odpowiedzialną pracę całej załogi. Dzięki temu jesteśmy postrzegani jako firma solidna, godna zaufania, mocno związana z lokalną społecznością.

Als Teil des Solvis Unternehmensverbunds liegen uns Innovationen und energieeinsparende Technologien sehr am Herzen. Jeden Tag leisten wir unseren Beitrag zur stückweisen Dekarbonisierung im Gebäudesektor und tragen somit zur zwingend notwendigen Energiewende bei. 

Wie uns das gelingt? Mit Digitalisierung!
Die LoRaWAN Funktechnologie ist die Basis unserer Produkte. Nur mit ihr lässt sich die BlackBox der Trinkwasserzirkulation öffnen. Dabei kommt es darauf an, zu sehen, was über Jahrzehnte verborgen blieb, aber auch die bestehenden Mängel über eine Regelbarkeit zu beseitigen. 

Sie wünschen mehr Informationen? Dann besuchen Sie uns gerne auf unserer Homepage unter www.blueleaftech.de, oder nehmen Sie per Mail Kontakt mit uns auf: info@blueleaftech.de

Name: Agua Fresh Portugal
Description:
Água Fresh, a revolutionary company committed to water creation and environmental protection. As worldwide concerns about droughts, water scarcity, price increases and water quality continue to rise, finding sustainable and efficient ways to obtain clean drinking water is more important than ever. Água Fresh utilizes cutting-edge technology to extract moisture from the air and convert it into fresh, pure drinking water. Not only is this method environmentally friendly, but it also ensures that all people can have access to clean water - when and where they need it.

Our cutting-edge units are versatile and scalable, capable of meeting the water needs of diverse sectors, from residential homes to critical infrastructure such as hospitals, farms, schools, government offices as well as leisure golf courses, and hotels. Água Fresh units are designed to provide a reliable and eco-friendly solution. 

Here are some key features of our Air to Water Machine:
High Efficiency: Our machines are designed to extract maximum moisture from the air, even in low humidity environments, ensuring a steady supply of clean water.
Advanced Filtration: The water produced by our devices undergoes multiple stages of filtration to remove impurities and contaminants.
Easy Installation and Maintenance: Água Fresh units are designed for ease of use and convenience. Installation is simple, and regular maintenance is minimal, allowing you to enjoy fresh water with minimal hassle.
Self Sustaining:  Água Fresh units can also be powered by solar, operating off-the-grid, making it ideal for remote locations, eco-friendly homes, and areas prone to power outages.

Name: Water for the World
Description:
Millions of people are living without a safe water supply.

Let’s do something about that.

We can reach fresh water with the right tools.
As many as 50% of rural Kenyan villages have no fresh water supply. Residents rely on regular trips to retrieve polluted water from lakes.

Plentiful supplies of clean groundwater can be found deep underground, but this is difficult and expensive to obtain.

That's where we (and you) come in.

Deep boreholes unlock plentiful water supplies.
We provide access to clean groundwater sources by drilling deep boreholes and installing pumps.

Each water point must then be managed effectively to provide a consistent supply. We help with this to build stronger self-sufficient and secure communities. Read about our mission and six points in the featured post.

In Africa's rural and underserved communities, we deliver more than clean, running water — we deliver the foundation for growth. Our deep boreholes, smart pumping systems, and locally built infrastructure bring reliable water to schools, clinics, farms, and homes where it’s needed most.

But our mission goes further. We believe water is a launchpad — a catalyst that transforms villages into vibrant centers of opportunity. By unlocking access to safe, sustainable water, we enable communities to thrive, grow local economies, and lay the groundwork for urban-style development from within.

We partner with local leaders to deeply understand each community’s vision and priorities — then we design and deliver water systems built to last for generations. Because a water-secure Zimbabwe isn’t a dream for tomorrow — it’s being built today.

When water flows, possibility follows.

Name: Agua Fresh Europe
Description:
Água Fresh, a revolutionary company committed to water creation and environmental protection. As worldwide concerns about droughts, water scarcity, price increases and water quality continue to rise, finding sustainable and efficient ways to obtain clean drinking water is more important than ever. Água Fresh utilizes cutting-edge technology to extract moisture from the air and convert it into fresh, pure drinking water. Not only is this method environmentally friendly, but it also ensures that all people can have access to clean water - when and where they need it.

Our cutting-edge units are versatile and scalable, capable of meeting the water needs of diverse sectors, from residential homes to critical infrastructure such as hospitals, farms, schools, government offices as well as leisure golf courses, and hotels. Água Fresh units are designed to provide a reliable and eco-friendly solution. 

Here are some key features of our Air to Water Machine:
High Efficiency: Our machines are designed to extract maximum moisture from the air, even in low humidity environments, ensuring a steady supply of clean water.
Advanced Filtration: The water produced by our devices undergoes multiple stages of filtration to remove impurities and contaminants.
Easy Installation and Maintenance: Água Fresh units are designed for ease of use and convenience. Installation is simple, and regular maintenance is minimal, allowing you to enjoy fresh water with minimal hassle.
Self Sustaining:  Água Fresh units can also be powered by solar, operating off-the-grid, making it ideal for remote locations, eco-friendly homes, and areas prone to power outages.

Name: Shades of Blue
Description:
Shades of Blue, through the first water certification system, offers business-to-business consultancy and advocacy services for the sustainable management of water resources and river ecosystems, in particular for the implementation of SDG6 and the improvement of ESG performance, always creating collaborative governance in the lingo term. It provides services for monitoring, improving and communicating the positive or negative impact that companies in industrial sectors (agribusiness as a test bed, then fashion and chemical-metallurgical) have on the water they use and affect river ecosystems during their activities, bridging the gap between these and the externalities on the environment. On a path of gradual neutralisation of their polluting emissions into the rivers and more sustainable water management, the multilevel rating system, where each 'shade of blue' is an index representing a different level of water quality, and the company's performance will guide them to scale the certification level up to the highest level of cleanliness. Consequently, the startup is committed to providing training and consulting services to companies so that they have the knowledge and tools they need to improve their environmental performance without affecting their business.
The startup's services will generate added value within the business system and society, in compliance with the new European directives on sustainable finance and sustainability reporting and alignment with the European taxonomy. 
Shades of Blue is scalable, inclusive and adaptable, reaching all production activities impacting rivers and water, from the single small producer to large enterprises, where involvement and monitoring would cover the entire value chain, from the first step in the supply chain to the distribution of the final product.

Name: Advantageous Water Treatment Systems Pty Ltd
Description:
Advantageous Water Systems Australia (ADS) provides Containerised Nano-Material Water Purification Systems to purify contaminated water for irrigation, drinking water, commerce and mining.

Nano material targets specific contaminates at the molecular level to attract and adsorb specific pollutants such as Arsenic, Selenium, Perchlorate, Nitrate, Boron, Algae, Bacteria, Viruses and Total Dissolved Solids.

Placing nano pre-treatment ahead of traditional Reverse Osmosis (RO) systems significantly reduces the fouling of RO membranes, increasing RO efficiency and reducing the necessity for frequent RO maintenance. Nano pre-treatment results in longer RO membrane lifespan and reduced operational costs.

Nanoparticle separation is efficient, requiring less energy and time than alternative processes, and it can selectively target specific contaminants, leaving essential minerals untouched. 

Additionally, nano pretreatment can operate at lower pressures, reducing costs and environmental impact, making it a promising solution for clean water provision.

ADS Systems can operate at flow rates of up to 104 m3 per hour (2 ML par day) and requires < 740 kwh per ML of treated water.

ADS Systems come in 20 or 40 foot containers and contain course pretreatment, nano treatment and a RO system, making ADS Systems a turn key solution to water purification.

ADS Systems can reduce TDS in contaminated water from 12,000 ppm to drinking water levels (600 ppm) or less, whilst removing other specific contaminants such as Arsenic, Selenium, Perchlorate, Nitrate, Boron, Algae, Bacteria and Viruses.

ADS guarantees usable water at 75%+ or as much as 93%+ with a second pass.

Get in touch if you could benefit from purified water using nano technology.

Global Water Control Systems heeft een geheel nieuw, gepatenteerd systeem ontwikkeld

dat op een innovatieve manier regenwater buffert, afvoert en benut. Onze technologie is volledig modulair, waardoor het eenvoudig kan worden aangepast aan verschillende praktijk situaties en in de toekomst kan worden uitgebreid met pompsystemen en energie-opwekkende componenten.

Met een focus op duurzaamheid, betaalbaarheid en betrouwbaarheid ontwikkelen wij systemen die bijdragen aan wateropvang, gecontroleerde buffering en afvoer en stedelijke verkoeling.

Onze producten zijn eenvoudig te installeren, onderhoudsarm en werken zonder complexe elektronica. Dit maakt ze een kosteneffectief alternatief voor traditionele waterbeheersystemen. Van platte daken en riolering tot drainage en waterlopen – wij bieden oplossingen voor steden, bedrijven en de agrarische sector.



Met deze baanbrekende aanpak bieden wij een betaalbaar, efficiënt en duurzaam  alternatief voor traditionele waterbeheersystemen. Onze missie is om steden, bedrijven en de agrarische sector te helpen bij een veerkrachtige en toekomstbestendige waterhuishouding. Als pioniers in deze technologie bouwen we aan een wereld waarin water geen probleem is, maar een kans.

Name: Waves For Water Australia
Description:
We believe that access to clean water is a fundamental human right. This is why we have dedicated our lives to providing it, through the implementation of portable water filter systems, the digging/renovating of bore-hole wells, and the construction of rainwater harvesting/storing systems (in places where groundwater is not accessible).

Since 2014, Australian travelers have implemented over 500 water filters, to over 30 countries, providing up to 50,000 people with access to clean water. These people are adventurous, consciously-minded, empowered travelers, that do what they love (travel, surf, trek, explore, etc) and help along the way, through Waves For Water.

The global water crisis is solvable. The technology exists, along with the manpower to implement it. It just comes down to a choice: those who have access to clean water, choosing to provide it for those who don’t. On behalf of the entire Waves For Water team, we want to thank you for helping us make that choice.

Waves For Water Australia is a fully registered charity. Donations $2 and over are tax deductible.
