Name: Water Tank Rescue
Description:
Water Tank Rescue — 

At Water Tank Rescue, we believe a rainwater tank isn’t just a tank, it’s a whole system. And when each part works properly, you get safer, cleaner water and a system that lasts longer.

We help homes, businesses and community organisations maintain their rainwater harvesting systems with a clear, simple philosophy:

Capture clean water. Store clean water. Drink clean water.

That means focusing on every component that protects water quality — not just what’s inside the tank.

 Capture – Roofs, gutters, downpipes, leaf guards and first-flush devices are the first line of defence. If they’re dirty or neglected, everything downstream suffers.
 Store – Tanks, internal liners, inlets, outlets and sediment need proper cleaning and maintenance to prevent contamination and bad taste.
 Deliver – Pumps, filters, UV systems and plumbing all play a role in keeping water safe and usable.

Based in South East Queensland, we specialise in professional tank cleaning, system maintenance and troubleshooting. 

We pride ourselves on tidy work, clear communication and consistent processes — treating every system like a valuable asset.

Our goal is simple: help people feel confident in their rainwater — from the moment it lands on the roof, to the moment it comes out of the tap.

If you value preventative maintenance, professional service and water quality you can trust — we’d love to connect.

Name: South African Association for Water User Associations
Description:
The South African Association for Water User Associations (SAAFWUA) is a voluntary association representing Water User Associations, Irrigation Boards, and Local Water Management Forums. Its mission is to ensure effective, efficient, and sustainable local water resource management in South Africa by providing coordination, advocacy, support, and capacity building for its members.

Coordination & Collective Bargaining
SAAFWUA creates a platform for collaboration, knowledge sharing, data exchange, and joint negotiation. It strengthens collective bargaining power, supports members in discussions with government and stakeholders, and builds capacity to ensure water is managed responsibly and efficiently.

Advocacy & Influence
The association engages in policy advocacy and legislative input, represents members in national debates, collaborates with research institutions, and provides technical expertise. Through stakeholder engagement, media outreach, and public communication, SAAFWUA drives policy change and strengthens water governance.

Communication & Information
Members and stakeholders are kept informed through newsletters, reports, workshops, events, forums, partnerships, and direct communication. SAAFWUA’s communication ensures transparency, awareness, and informed decision-making across the sector.

Policy & Legislative Work
SAAFWUA contributes to policy development, legislative review, and advocacy for reforms, while collaborating with government, regulatory bodies, and stakeholders. It also builds member capacity to understand and engage with evolving water legislation.

Collaboration & Relationships
The association fosters partnerships among members, with government, stakeholders, and researchers. It promotes joint advocacy, best practice sharing, and networking through events, forums, and collaborative projects.

Research & Development

Name: Sourcetainable BV
Description:
Our vision is to use the subsurface as a third dimension to enable farmers to become self-sufficient in fresh water availability, without the farmer having to sacrifice valuable agricultural land. Aquifer Storage Transfer and Recovery as a nature based solution for fresh water buffering. As a result farmers can maintain or increase crop production without being dependent on the weather or external water sources. It reduces the risk of crop losses during periods of drought or salinization or plant diseases that spread through surface water. In addition the system purifies the water so that harmful remnants of pesticides or nutrients are no longer discharged into the environment. Improving the water quality and thus the ecology in a larger area.
In our vision an ASR (aquifer storage and recovery) system works optimal when combined with economical and data-driven use of the harvested and stored water, like subirrigation and drip irrigation. Besides the reduction in water use fertilizer use and often pesticide use can be decreased.

Name: Huella Hídrica
Description:
¿ Quieres ser parte de proyecto HuellaHidrica.net WorkS ? La huella hídrica es un indicador del uso de agua dulce que hace referencia tanto a su uso directo como indirecto por parte de un consumidor o productor. La huella hídrica puede considerarse como un indicador integral de la apropiación de los recursos de agua dulce, ya que se utiliza para medir el volumen total de agua que una empresa usa para producir bienes y servicios, o que un individuo o comunidad consuma.

El uso se mide en el volumen de agua consumida, evaporada o contaminada, ya sea por unidad de tiempo para individuos y comunidades, o por unidad de masa para empresas. La huella hídrica se puede calcular para cualquier grupo definido de consumidores (por ejemplo, individuos, familias, pueblos, ciudades, provincias, estados o naciones) o productores (por ejemplo, organismos públicos, empresas privadas o el sector económico).

Name: Pozos Puerto Varas
Description:
Ofrecemos servicios integrales para la extracción de aguas subterráneas utilizando el sistema de perforación de rotación directa, reconocido a nivel mundial como el método más eficaz para la construcción de pozos para agua potable. 

Somos un equipo de ingenieros y geólogos con experiencia en la minería y la industria acuícola que hace años nos unimos para compartir experiencias y conocimiento con la finalidad de brindar un servicio integral en extracción de aguas subterráneas y desarrollo de estudios hidrogeológicos con foco en la zona sur de Chile. 

NUESTROS SERVICIOS

•Supervisión en terreno para proyectos de perforación o estudios de agua subterránea (inspección técnica).

•Gestión en derechos de agua.

•Perforación de pozos para monitoreo o extracción de aguas subterráneas.

•Pruebas de bombeo y mantención de pozos.

•Instalación de sistema de monitoreo de extracción efectiva. Res. DGA 1238

•Monitoreo de pozo con cámara submarina

•Estudios hidrogeológicos.

•Pozos de infiltración.

VENTAJAS SISTEMAS DE PERFORACIÓN CON ROTACIÓN DIRECTA:

Su principal ventaja es que permite utilizar diferentes materiales de habilitación, como aceros galvanizados, aceros inoxidables y PVC, siendo este último el más recomendado para proyectos de agua.

Otra ventaja es su mayor diámetro, el cual permite incorporar un filtro de gravilla, evitando así el ingreso de arena o limos al interior del pozo.

La habilitación con PVC no produce corrosión, no se contamina el agua y no requiere de mantenimiento. Su vida útil es superior a los 25 años.

Developing and updating Risk Management Plans (RMPs) for both supply and use

Assigning Log Reduction Values (LRVs), critical control points, and monitoring requirements

Advising on safe and sustainable irrigation practices

Training and upskilling staff to build confidence in recycled water compliance

Engaging directly with recycled water users to ensure obligations are understood and met

RWS is led by Gretchen Marshall, a water industry professional with extensive experience across councils, SA Water, and the Department for Health and Wellbeing. From large metropolitan treatment plants to regional and remote schemes, Gretchen brings a rare perspective on both operational and regulatory challenges.

Our mission is simple: to help organisations to harness the benefits of recycled water while protecting public health, meeting compliance obligations, and contributing to environmental sustainability and water security.

2,500,000 people in communities, refugee settlements, schools, and health facilities in rural Eastern Uganda.

Notre priorité : assurer la performance, la durabilité et la conformité des installations, tout en garantissant une intervention rapide et un service de qualité.

Nos techniciens sont formés en continu aux dernières normes et techniques d’assainissement, ce qui nous permet d’intervenir efficacement sur tous types de sites, qu’ils soient résidentiels, tertiaires ou industriels. Nous disposons de véhicules équipés pour répondre à toutes les urgences et réaliser des diagnostics précis, avec un souci constant de propreté, sécurité et efficacité.

Nous accompagnons nos clients sur le long terme grâce à des contrats de maintenance préventive et un suivi rigoureux, dans le respect des réglementations environnementales.

 Basée à Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (94), IP Serve intervient dans toute l’Île-de-France.

 Expertise technique |  Intervention rapide |  Engagement durable |  Partenaire de proximité

Name: iPURtech
Description:
iPURtech provides innovative purification technologies for a wide range of air and turbid fluid applications using environmentally friendly catalytic surface coatings stimulated by ultraviolet light as the basis for our product range.

Self-cleaning and turbulent pathways make for an efficient and compact design which has three times the kill rate of similarly powered LIQUID PURIFICATION systems.

Our AIR PURIFICATION systems match the correct photocatalyst to the odour or gas to be removed. 

Our reputation is built on enabling our customers to meet increasing legislative and economic demands by providing cost benefits with significant environmental and health advantages.

We have quickly grown to become one of the world’s most respected authorities on the application of photocatalytic surface coatings and UV activated nanotechnology.

Our range of products utilise these technologies to solve a host of industrial health and safety, waste management and environmental issues.

Name: Vietnam Water Week
Description:
( English below) Tuần lễ Nước Việt Nam (Vietnam Water Week- VWW) là sự kiện quan trọng hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực cấp thoát nước, xử lý nước thải và bảo vệ tài nguyên nước tại Việt Nam. Được tổ chức bởi Hội Cấp thoát nước Việt Nam (VWSA) và Vietfair, sự kiện quy tụ các chuyên gia, doanh nghiệp, tổ chức và cơ quan quản lý trong nước và quốc tế nhằm chia sẻ kinh nghiệm, công nghệ và giải pháp sáng tạo hướng tới phát triển bền vững ngành nước.
Triển lãm trong khuôn khổ sự kiện sẽ giới thiệu các sản phẩm, công nghệ tiên tiến, giải pháp thông minh trong quản lý và xử lý nước. Đồng thời, hội thảo chuyên đề sẽ mang đến những phân tích chuyên sâu về chính sách, xu hướng và cơ hội đầu tư trong ngành.
Vietnam Water Week là nền tảng kết nối quan trọng, tạo cơ hội cho các doanh nghiệp mở rộng hợp tác, thúc đẩy đổi mới sáng tạo và hướng tới mục tiêu phát triển ngành nước bền vững, thích ứng với biến đổi khí hậu.
-----------
Vietnam Water Week (VWW) is a premier event in the field of water supply, wastewater treatment, and water resource protection in Vietnam. Organized by the Vietnam Water Supply and Sewerage Association (VWSA) and Vietfair ( VF), the event brings together experts, businesses, organizations, and regulatory agencies from both domestic and international sectors to share experiences, technologies, and innovative solutions for sustainable water sector development.
The exhibition within the event will showcase advanced products, cutting-edge technologies, and smart solutions for water management and treatment. Additionally, specialized conferences will provide in-depth discussions on policies, trends, and investment opportunities in the industry.
Vietnam Water Week serves as a vital networking platform, offering businesses opportunities to expand partnerships, drive innovation, and work towards a sustainable water sector that adapts to climate change.

Name: SCALEDP
Description:
Welcome to ScaleDp – Your best scale prevention solution

At ScaleDp, we believe that technology has the power to transform businesses and reshape industries. Founded in 2010, we have been at the forefront of innovation, providing cutting-edge solutions that empower our clients to thrive in the digital age

Our Mission: Scale Prevention for a Better World
At ScaleDp, our mission is to revolutionize the way industries tackle the persistent challenge of scale buildup. We are driven by a vision of a world where scale-related problems are minimized, leading to improved efficiency, sustainability, and cost savings across various sectors by using DPSE technology powered by ScaleDp.

Our solutions are designed to be adaptable and customizable, catering to the specific needs and challenges of various industries. We work closely with our clients to understand their unique requirements, assess their systems, and provide tailored recommendations to prevent scale formation effectively.

Our mission extends beyond scale prevention; it is about empowering industries to thrive. By preventing scale buildup, we enable businesses to operate at peak efficiency, reduce downtime, and optimize their processes. This leads to significant cost savings, improved productivity, and a positive impact on the bottom line.

Together, we can create a world where scale-related challenges are minimized, resources are utilized efficiently, and industries operate sustainably. Join us in our mission to revolutionize scale prevention and build a better future for all.

Die Reinheit des Wassers zu bewahren oder wieder herzustellen gewinnt in unserer Zeit immer mehr an Bedeutung und Komplexität.

Pfaff Wassertechnik GmbH bietet professionelle und qualitativ hochwertige Aufbereitung von Wasser in allen Bereichen der Wasserversorgung - für mehr Komfort, Sicherheit, Hygiene und Lebensqualität.

Als Grünbeck-Werkvertretung für die Region Nord-, Mittel und Osthessen vertrauen wir ausschließlich auf bewährte Produkte und Verfahrenstechniken, die den wissenschaftlich geprüften Standards entsprechen und nachhaltig in der Praxis erprobt sind.

Die Produktpalette reicht vom einfachen Wasserfiltern und Enthärtungsanlagen für Privathaushalte bis zu hocheffizienten Wasseraufbereitungssystemen für Kommunen, Gewerbe, Industrie und Gesundheitswesen.
Spezialisten sind wir auch in der Wasseraufbereitung für private und öffentliche Schwimmbäder und Whirlpools.

In 2018 the Renmark Irrigation Trust became the first agricultural site and first irrigation scheme in the world to be awarded gold level certification by the Alliance for Water Stewardship. The award recognises excellence in the management of water through its high standard of governance, efficient use of water for its members and partnerships with community groups in environmental restoration. In 2020, the Trust became the first irrigation scheme in the world to be awarded platinum level certification, the highest level of certification under the Alliance for Water Stewardship model. Name: EarthMetric Innovations
Description:
Headquartered in Indiana and developed at Michigan State University, our team collaborates closely with the university and various agricultural groups to implement a revolutionary low-cost sensor monitoring system, essential for optimizing irrigation and ensuring superior crop quality. Our tested innovations, validated in over 25 Michigan farms demonstrate a notable 30% improvement in water use efficiency, offering a cost-effective solution to farmers and contributing towards a greener planet.

Effective disease management in agriculture involves reducing fertilizer and fungi usage through advanced AI decision tools that provide comprehensive analysis and tailored recommendations. These tools optimize water levels, ensuring plants receive the right amount of hydration. Real-time alerts for critical indicators allow for immediate action, significantly improving crop yield by up to 30%. Algorithms process vast amounts of data to determine the optimal timing for irrigation and fungicide application, as well as assess disease severity. This data-driven approach ensures precise interventions, enhancing the efficiency and sustainability of farming practices while promoting healthier crops and reducing environmental impact.

Nous offrons un accompagnement expert pour surmonter les défis liés aux investissements, aux choix technologiques, et au respect des réglementations en vigueur.

•	Financer et mener à bien des projets innovants dans le domaine de l’eau. Face aux bouleversements climatiques, l’innovation devient incontournable. Nous apportons l’expertise nécessaire pour optimiser le financement et la gestion, tout en réduisant les risques de pertes de temps et de ressources.

En outre, E-H2O ambitionne de devenir la première offre de production couplée d’énergie renouvelable et d’eau non conventionnelle, à travers l’exploitation du photovoltaïque et de la réutilisation des eaux usées traitées, notamment dans les zones rurales et semi-rurales. Nous adoptons une approche intégrée, en assurant le pilotage de bout en bout des projets : de la conception à l’exploitation, en passant par le financement et les démarches réglementaires, tout en collaborant étroitement avec les acteurs locaux pour garantir la réussite et l’adéquation des solutions aux besoins du territoire.

Name: GRO (Grassroots Resource Optimization)
Description:
GRO (Grassroots Resource Optimization Ltd) is a sustainability-focused company specializing in water conservation and irrigation management solutions. We partner with municipalities, contractors, sustainability professionals, and public-sector organizations to optimize water use, reduce waste, and achieve community sustainability goals. Our mission is to help communities manage water more responsibly while improving operational efficiency and reducing environmental impact. 

At GRO, we provide a holistic range of services, including precise water usage analysis, irrigation audits, project design and management, training, and consultation. Our Certified Landscape Irrigation Auditors (CLIA) blend practical field knowledge with cutting-edge technology to achieve tangible outcomes. Utilizing centralized control systems and live sensor monitoring, we optimize irrigation schedules to prevent both over- and under-watering. This data-driven strategy enables you to monitor water consumption, quantify savings, and demonstrate environmental sustainability, ensuring vibrant and sustainable landscapes. 

The outcome? Greener parks, healthier public spaces, and significantly less water waste for your community.  We pride ourselves on being an informative, community-driven partner that helps you meet conservation targets without compromising your operational performance. And through training and ongoing consultation, we ensure your team is equipped to sustain and build upon these water-saving practices for the long term. 

Start the conversation! 
 Let’s connect and explore how GRO can support your community with sustainable, data-driven water solutions. 

See the impact: 
 Visit justsavewater.ca to learn how we help municipalities and partners reduce water use, improve system performance, and protect landscape health.

Name: Indlela Consultants
Description:
Indlela Consultants (Pty) Ltd was founded in 2013.


The company was originally established in Thohoyandou as a formulating and distribution facility serving primarily Limpopo, Mpmulanga and the NW Province.

Between 2013 and 2019 the company expanded its customer base and product range to become one of the leading suppliers of coagulants and disinfectants to the public water sector.

 

During this period the company also embarked on a quality management system which resulted in the achievement of

ISO 9001:2015
ISO 14001:2015
ISO 45001:2018
NSF/ANSI/CAN 60.
Until 2019 the company was heavily reliant on local and imported sources for the products it sold, but in that year took a decision to become as self reliant as possible. 

As a result, a large “green fields” site was purchased near Rosslyn in Tshwane and the company commenced an ambitious program of designing, building and commissioning its own facility for the production of key raw materials used in the formulation of coagulants, disinfectants and related chemicals.

Indlela is a proudly South African company. In this way the company differentiates itself from the more common chemical blending and resale operations and in fact has become a major supplier to many of these resellers.

Now the company is able to offer local products to resellers and also to expand the market for its products through new marketing channels into industrial water treatment and process applications.

The company is now a significant employer  and continues to run its operation in Limpopo and expand its production capability in Tshwane.

The company employs experienced water treatment technicians that can advise on chemical selection and usage and owns its own transport fleet.

Indlela’s driving force is customer service and every aspect of the operation is focused on fast and efficient response to all customer enquiries or orders.

A Reliable Partner in Water, Sanitation & Hygiene (WaSH) 
Arox WaSH Constructions and Consultancy Ltd is committed to improving lives and transforming communities through sustainable Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene (WaSH) solutions.

We proudly stand as a trusted partner across four critical pillars:

 Feasibility Studies
We begin with deep insight—providing thorough assessments to determine technical, environmental, and socio-economic viability for WaSH infrastructure projects. Our studies guide evidence-based planning and long-term sustainability.

 Construction
From clean water supply systems and sanitation facilities to community-level WaSH infrastructure, we design and build resilient solutions tailored to local needs. Quality, durability, and safety are non-negotiables.

 Consultancy Services
Our expertise spans the full project lifecycle—from planning and design to monitoring and evaluation. Governments, NGOs, and private sector clients rely on our technical advice to maximize impact and efficiency.

 Capacity Development & Community Empowerment
We believe that real change happens when communities are equipped to sustain it. We provide training, advocacy, and awareness programs to empower local leaders, schools, and households with essential WaSH knowledge and skills.

At Arox WaSH, we don’t just build infrastructure—we help build healthier futures.

Let’s create a world where access to safe water, sanitation, and hygiene is a reality for all.

Wat is een waterpuls?
Een waterpuls is een buis in de grond waar u met behulp van een waterpomp grondwater kan onttrekken. Het is een watervoorziening die voor vele doeleinden gebruikt kan worden, veel voorkomend voorbeeld is het beregenen van uw tuin.

Door de methode die wij hanteren, kunnen wij vrijwel overal komen en blijft uw locatie schoon. Tijdens het aanleggen van de waterpuls spuiten wij tot een diepte waardoor uw puls voldoende water genereerd, wij kunnen tot maximaal 20m diep spuiten.

Beregeningen
Wij zijn ook gespecialiseerd in het aanleggen van beregeningssystemen in bestaande of nieuw aan te leggen tuinen. Wij maken het beregeningssysteem compleet naar uw wens, van eenvoudige systemen tot compleet geautomatiseerd en voor ieder budget.

Name: Perenne Soluções Inovadoras em Tratamento e Reúso de Água
Description:
Na Perenne, nossa paixão é traduzida em cada solução de tratamento de água e efluentes que projetamos e implementamos. Movidos pela convicção de que cada gota de água merece ser tratada com respeito, nos dedicamos a entregar mais de três décadas de inovação em engenharia hidráulica e tratamento de água. Nossa missão vai além de atender às demandas atuais - ela é uma promessa de proteger o recurso mais vital da Terra para o amanhã.

Nossas especialidades refletem um legado construído sobre padrões excepcionais, desde sistemas de tratamento de efluentes que redefinem a eficiência até soluções de reúso de água que convertem preocupações ambientais em oportunidades para um desenvolvimento responsável. Nossos especialistas, com uma dedicação inigualável à excelência, projetam cada solução com precisão, assegurando não apenas o cumprimento dos mais altos padrões ambientais, mas também a otimização do consumo e da energia.

A Perenne oferece uma gama diversificada de serviços e produtos, especializando-se em Estações de Tratamento de Água (ETA) e Estações de Tratamento de Efluentes (ETE), que proporcionam soluções customizadas para o tratamento de água para consumo industrial, comercial e residencial. Nossos Sistemas de Desmineralização são a vanguarda tecnológica para a remoção de sais e minerais, enquanto nossas Soluções de Reúso de Água são projetadas para promover o uso eficiente da água, apoiando a sustentabilidade e reduzindo custos operacionais.

Com um portfólio que abrange desde a desmineralização avançada até a tecnologia de ponta em tratamento biológico, nos orgulhamos de ser um aliado confiável para indústrias e comunidades. Nosso compromisso com a eficiência energética e a sustentabilidade é evidente em cada gota de água purificada e em cada cliente satisfeito.

Na Perenne, não é apenas sobre tratamento de água - é sobre garantir que cada gota contribua para um legado de saúde, pureza e sustentabilidade para nosso planeta.

Name: R-Sensors
Description:
Notre technologie consiste en un nouveau lecteur de pH pour mesurer l’acidité et / ou la basicité d’un liquide. La mesure du pH est essentielle dans de nombreux domaines tels que l’industrie alimentaire, le traitement des eaux usées, les secteurs minier et métallurgique ainsi que la biofermentation. Le lecteur de pH est composé de nanomatériaux à base de carbone avec une lecture optique qui le rend stable sur toute la gamme de pH (1-12 pH) et dans des conditions difficiles (pH bas ou températures élevées). Ce concept novateur est analogue à un lecteur de pH conventionnel équipé d’une référence interne, avec les avantages supplémentaires de mesures sans fil, à distance et en continu.

----------

Our technology consists of a novel pH sensor to measure acidity and/or basicity of a liquid. pH measurement is essential in many areas such as the food industry, wastewater treatment, mining and metallurgical sectors as well as biofermentation. Our innovative pH sensor is composed of carbon-based nanomaterials with an optical readout which makes it stable across the full range of pH (1-12 pH) and in harsh conditions (low pH or high temperatures). This unique design is analogous to a conventional pH sensor equipped with a built-in internal reference, with the added benefits of wireless, remote and continuous measurements.

Name: Est-Pluie
Description:
Est-pluie :
Avec une expérience de plus de 12 ans, Est-pluie incarne l'engagement inébranlable envers la qualité et la pureté de l'eau. Nous sommes une entreprise unie par une passion commune : rendre l'eau accessible à tous . 

 Technologie innovantes

Notre expertise repose sur l'utilisation de technologies de traitement de l'eau de pointe. Des systèmes de filtration avancés aux techniques de désinfection innovantes, nous restons à la pointe pour garantir des résultats de qualité exceptionnelle. Chaque solution est conçue sur mesure, prenant en compte les caractéristiques spécifiques de l'eau à traiter.

 Projets Complexes, Solutions Complètes

Au fil des années, nous avons étendu notre portée au-delà des problématiques locales pour aborder des défis complexes à l'échelle mondiale. Nos projets englobent la conception de systèmes de traitement d'eau potable, la gestion des eaux usées et l'intégration de technologies durables pour minimiser l'impact environnemental.

 Famille Étendue, Impact Global

Bien que notre histoire ait commencé dans une petite communauté, notre ambition s'étend au-delà des frontières. Avec une équipe dédiée et une approche holistique du traitement de l'eau, nous avons étendu notre impact à l'échelle mondiale. Chaque filtre que nous concevons, chaque projet que nous entreprenons, contribue à un monde où l'accès à l'eau potable n'est pas un luxe, mais un droit fondamental.

 Une Famille, Une Vision, Un Avenir Hydraté

En tant qu'entreprise familiale, notre vision va au-delà des chiffres et des systèmes. Nous sommes guidés par une vision partagée de l'eau comme catalyseur de vie, de santé et de prospérité. Rejoignez-nous dans notre mission de créer un avenir hydraté, où chaque goutte compte.

  - les meilleures conditions de réalisation des unités de traitement des eaux usées, tout en s’appuyant sur les retours en matière de R&D.

Description:
Több mint 30 éve az öntözéstechnika, szivattyútechnika és kertépítés területén. Az elmúlt évtizedekben számtalan magánkert, ipari létesítmény és közterület zöldfelületének fenntartását és öntözőrendszerének kiépítését végeztük el. A folyamatos innovációnak és szakmai fejlődésnek köszönhetően mindig a legmodernebb megoldásokat kínáljuk ügyfeleink számára.

A minőség és a megfizethetőség nálunk kéz a kézben jár. Saját telephelyünknek és hatékony munkaszervezésünknek köszönhetően költséghatékony megoldásokat kínálunk, anélkül hogy kompromisszumot kötnénk az anyagok és a kivitelezés minőségében.

Csapatunk tapasztalt és elkötelezett szakemberekből áll, akik nemcsak a kivitelezésben, hanem tervezésben, karbantartásban és tanácsadásban is segítenek. Minden munkánkat precíz dokumentációval rögzítjük, így akár évek múltán is hatékonyan végezhetünk javításokat és bővítéseket.

Minden általunk telepített öntözőrendszerre és szivattyútechnikára garanciát vállalunk, valamint folyamatos szervizhátteret biztosítunk. Ügyfeleink számára mindig elérhetők vagyunk, és a gyors problémamegoldás kiemelt prioritásunk.

Az első lépéstől a beüzemelésig, majd, az éves karbantartásig és bővítésig mindenben támogatjuk ügyfeleinket. Szakértői tanácsadással, helyszíni felméréssel és személyre szabott megoldásokkal biztosítjuk, hogy mindenki a lehető legjobb rendszert kapja kertje, parkja vagy ipari létesítménye számára.

We focus on the complete cycle of water equipment supply, installation, and after-sales back-up. Our expertise covers a wide spectrum of water and power systems:
Borehole Services: This includes hydrogeological surveying, drilling, development, equipping, and maintenance.

Water Supply & Treatment: We design and size complete water supply and treatment systems. We also manage the fabrication and installation of various storage solutions, including steel tanks, towers, PVC tanks, and masonry tanks.

Irrigation: We design and install comprehensive irrigation and drainage works, including lawn and drip systems.

Power & Environment: Our services extend to Environmental Impact Assessments (E.I.A.), as well as the sale and installation of essential power products such as generator sets, diesel/petrol engines, and solar power systems.

Our Team and Partnerships
As appointed dealers for world-leading water pump and equipment manufacturers, including Dayliff, Grundfos, and Pedrollo, we ensure our clients receive high-quality products. Our operations are supported by a skilled team of in-house personnel, consultants, associates, including chief drillers, geologists, irrigation engineers, environmental engineers, and a dedicated borehole and pump service crew.


Our goal remains to provide customers with practical solutions that lead to the economic self-sustainability of regions by ensuring an efficient water and drainage system.

اين شركت پس از اخذ پروانه بهره برداري در زمينه توليد اتصالات آبياري پلي پروپيلن از اداره كل صنايع خراسان، كيفيت محصولات توليدي را سرلوحه كار خود قرار داده و در جهت نيل به اين هدف، با استفاده از پرسنل مجرب و مواد اوليه مرغوب و با بهره گيري از پيشرفته ترين ماشين آلات و تجهيزات، گامهاي بلندي در سطح ملي و كشوري برداشته و به عنوان اولين واحد در ايران، موفق به اخذ دو پروانه كاربرد علامت استاندارد در زمينه توليد "اتصالات مكانيكي لوله هاي پلي اتيلن فشار قوي" و "بست كمربندي پلاستيكي لوله هاي پلي اتيلن تحت فشار" از اداره كل استاندارد و تحقيقات صنعتي خراسان رضوي گرديده است. اين شركت در جهت توسعه محصولات و سبد كالايي خود و نياز بازار، به عنوان اولين واحد در سه استان خراسان رضوي، شمالي و جنوبي اقدام به توليد "اتصالات جوشي فشار قوي پلي اتيلن" و "اتصالات رزوه اي (دنده اي) پليمري" و "سرشيلنگي ها" نموده است كه قبلاً اين نوع اتصالات از ساير استانها تامين مي شده است.
اين شركت با ثبت اختراع، به عنوان اولين واحد در ايران اقدام به توليد سری کامل "مغزي هاي تبديل دنده اي پليمري" از سايز 2/1 اينچ تا 4 اينچ نمود كه جزو گروه اتصالات رزوه اي (دنده اي) پليمري مي باشند.
اين شركت با توجه به گواهي هاي كيفيت اخذ شده از مركز توسعه مكانيزاسيون كشاورزي، داراي مجوز دفترتوسعه سامانه هاي نوين آبياري از معاونت آب و خاك و صنايع جهاد كشاورزي مبني بر عرضه محصولات توليدي خود در پروژه هاي آبياري تحت فشار در كشاورزي مي باشد كه هر سه سال اين گواهي ها و مجوز تمديد مي گردد و نام اين شركت در ليست توليدكنندگان مجاز مي باشد.
اين شركت با توجه به اينكه محصولات خود را بر طبق دستورالعمل آب و فاضلاب كشوري توليد مي كند، يكي از تامين كنندگان مجاز آب و فاضلاب استانها مي باشد.

We’re more than just a pump manufacturer—we’re a trusted partner in water security. With an extensive dealer network and exceptional customer support, we help individuals, families, and communities around the world secure their most vital resource.

 Empowering Self-Reliance. Ensuring Water Security.

Name: Clearwater Springs Water Treatment
Description:
Clearwater Springs Water Treatment is the #1 water treatment provider serving Eastern Washington, Kootenai County, and Bonner County. With over 20 years of operating in Idaho and Eastern Washington, Clearwater Spring is the most trusted provider by Pacific Northwest residents for water filtration, iron removal, and custom water treatment systems. 

Recognizing a need for superior water filtration services, in 2000, our founder Tom McVay set out to provide clean and clear water for Pacific Northwest residents. Since our founding, our team of highly skilled water specialists have solved some of the most challenging water problems for over 1,000 residences across Idaho and Washington. 
 
Years later, our current owner, Shayne McVay, took over the family business from his dad. Coming from generations of water treatment providers, he developed his passion for the water business at a young age. With over 10 years of experience in the water filtration industry, he has utilized his expertise in installing the highest quality water treatment systems to accelerate the growth of Clearwater Springs throughout the Northern Idaho and Washington regions. 

Today, we are proud to be an American-made and family-owned business in Northern Idaho. Our commitment as a business is to provide the highest quality services, treatment systems, and ongoing resources for our loyal customers across the beautiful pacific northwest. 

Thank you to all of our loyal customers who trust Clearwater Springs Water Treatment to keep their water clean and pure. We look forward to continuing to provide the finest water filtration systems for Kootenai County, Eastern Washington, and Bonner County residents.

Name: WaterBEL (Renewable Desalination Solution)
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de WaterBEL, une initiative visionnaire dédiée à résoudre la crise de l'eau grâce à des solutions novatrices et durables. 

Chez WaterBEL, notre objectif est de transformer l'eau de mer en une ressource précieuse et accessible. À travers l'utilisation ingénieuse de l'énergie solaire, notre dispositif collecte et purifie l'eau, éliminant les sels et les impuretés pour répondre aux besoins en eau des communautés côtières, des industries et des agriculteurs.

Notre mission transcende la simple fourniture d'eau douce. Nous aspirons à améliorer la qualité de vie des populations en offrant des solutions abordables et respectueuses de l'environnement. En tant que gardiens de notre planète, WaterBEL s'engage à répondre à la demande croissante en eau potable tout en préservant les écosystèmes marins.

En collaboration étroite avec les parties prenantes locales, les gouvernements et les organisations non gouvernementales, nous œuvrons pour faciliter l'accès à l'eau douce dans les zones côtières. Notre objectif ultime est de réduire la dépendance des communautés vis-à-vis des sources d'eau limitées et souvent contaminées, créant ainsi un avenir plus prometteur pour les générations futures.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette mission cruciale pour un monde où l'eau potable est une réalité pour tous. Ensemble, façonnons un avenir plus durable et épanouissant.  #WaterBEL #EauPotable #Durabilité #InnovationH2O

Name: Water8
Description:
Earth's Fresh Water

Most people have heard Earth referred to as "the water planet." With that name comes the rightful image of a world with plentiful water. In photographs taken from space, we can see that our planet has more water than land. However, of all the water on Earth, more than 99 percent of Earth's water is unusable by humans and many other living things - only about 0.3 percent of our fresh water is found in the surface water of lakes, rivers, and swamps.

We can see that our planet has more water than land. It is unexpected and somewhat inconceivable that less than three percent of Earth's water is fresh water. According to the U.S. Geological Survey, most of that three percent is inaccessible. More than 68 percent of the fresh water on Earth is found in icecaps and glaciers, and just over 30 percent is found in ground water. Only about 0.3 percent of our fresh water is found in the surface water of lakes, rivers, and swamps. Of all the water on Earth, more than 99 percent of Earth's water is unusable by humans and many other living things. It seems extraordinary that the water that supports all terrestrial, as well as aquatic, life on our planet is actually so scarce. With this stunning realization comes a recognition that we have to use this resource very wisely. An important first step is to educate ourselves and future generations of citizens.

Water8 “One drop, makes a difference!”

Name: Highflo Philippines
Description:
Highflo offers various types of water purifier filters, including

PP Ordinary (Polypropylene): Sediment filters made from polypropylene material designed to remove suspended particles like sand, dirt, rust, and silt. These are often the first stage in a water filtration system. They come in different sizes, like 10-inch and 20-inch.
PP Pleated: These filters have a pleated design, likely offering a larger surface area for filtration and potentially a longer lifespan compared to standard PP filters.
PP Winding (Yarn Wound): These filters are made by winding yarn around a core, creating layers that trap particles. They can offer different micron ratings depending on the winding density.
Ceramic Water Filter Elements: These are described as high quality with absolute filtration down to 0.9 microns. They can remove algae, rust, sediment, and suspended solids and inhibit the growth of and reduce harmful bacteria and cysts.
Availability: Highflo products, particularly their water filters, are available for purchase online through platforms like

Lazada Philippines: Lazada also offers Highflo PP filters.

Après quelques mois à commercialiser et installer des chaudières biomasse, j'ai pu tester un appareil afin de protéger ma chaufferie ainsi que tous les appareils ménagers, tuyauterie, salle de bain, circulateur, pommeau de douche etc. 

L'option d'un adoucisseur n'était pas en adéquation avec le projet de la maison: achat de sel, consommation d'eau potable pour nettoyer les résines, rejet de saumure, entretien, pièces d'usure etc. 

Depuis lors cet appareil a été installé chez des particuliers, institutions publiques communales, copropriétés syndic, et entreprises industrielles, soit à la vente ou location.

Ne consomme ni électricité, ni sel, n'a pas besoin d'entretien, un combo gagnant pour la nature et votre portefeuille !

Au plaisir de vous renseigner.

Name: AQUA VICTORIA
Description:
Aqua Victoria offers high-quality, sustainable drinking water refills to customers throughout the country. 
Our water refills are purified through a state-of-the-art filtration system that ensures the water is free from impurities and contaminants. 
We also offer a range of reusable water bottles for purchase, which customers can use to refill at our store or take with them on the go.

Our water refills are available in various sizes, including 5L, 10L, and 20L bottles. Each bottle is made of high-quality, BPA-free plastic and is designed for multiple uses, making it a sustainable option for environmentally-conscious customers.

Our filtration system uses a multi-stage process to remove impurities from the water, including sediment, chlorine, minerals and other chemicals. The water is then treated with ultraviolet light to eliminate any remaining bacteria or viruses. This process ensures that our water refills are safe, healthy, and great-tasting.

In addition to our water refills, we also offer a range of reusable water bottles for purchase. These bottles are made of high-quality materials and are designed to be durable and long-lasting. We offer a variety of sizes, shapes, and colors to cater to different preferences.

To promote our products and services, we have developed sales brochures that provide detailed information on our water refills and reusable bottles. These brochures highlight the benefits of our products, including their environmental sustainability, health benefits, and affordability.

We also have a website that features our products and services, including product descriptions, prices, and ordering information. Customers can place orders for refills and reusable bottles online and have them delivered to their doorstep.

Overall, our products and services are designed to provide customers with a convenient, sustainable, and healthy option for drinking water. We are committed to providing high-quality products and excellent customer service.

Name: HoofstraA BV
Description:
HoofstraA BV is hét bedrijf dat oplossingen 
biedt voor de problemen die ontstaan door het steeds extremer wordende klimaat. Met ons eigen ontwikkelde systeem kunnen we op een duurzame manier continu de veiligheid van (open)water en natuurbeken monitoren. We richten ons hierbij vooral op de problemen die ontstaan door oa pieklozingen, riooloverstorten, algenbloei en zuurstoftekorten. Ons speciaal ontwikkelde MaxDO Platforms profiteren van het natuurlijke fenomeen van het oplossen van extreem kleine gasbubbels (‘ultrafijne bubbels’), resulterend in een aanzienlijke toename van opgeloste zuurstof (DO). Een hoge aanwezigheid van opgeloste zuurstof (DO) in het water is de sleutel voor natuurlijke, zelfreinigende processen van het water en een gezonde omgeving voor micro-organismen, dieren, planten en mensen. Deze gunstige bacteriën maken van nature water schoon en herstellen de natuurlijke balans van water.

Daarnaast biedt HoofstraA BV ook oplossingen voor betrouwbare innovatieve pompsystemen voor peilregeling, sub-irrigatie, druppelirrigatie en zwembadpompen op zonne-energie. Geen energiekosten, hoge capaciteit in warme/zonnige perioden en optioneel monitoring op afstand in verschillende SCADA systemen zoals AquaView++

Name: Ítabo Water Company
Description:
We found it — the water the world has been looking for.

Itabo is not just another bottled water brand. It’s live, ancestral spring water sourced from the untouched mountains of Puerto Rico — gravity-fed straight from the earth, bottled in glass, and delivered to the world exactly as nature intended.

No plastic. No chemical or ozone filtration. No compromise. No Micro-Plastics

At a time when 93% of bottled waters contain microplastics and most “spring” water is just reprocessed municipal tap, Itabo offers something truly rare: real, mineral-rich live water, drawn from deep volcanic rock and never touched by industrial processes.

We’re bottling purity with purpose.

 Sustainable to the core
From glass packaging to solar-assisted operations and eco-conscious sourcing, we’re building a better beverage model—one rooted in legacy, not landfill.

 Positioned for the future
As water becomes the world’s most critical resource, we’re building a brand that stands at the intersection of health, scarcity, and sustainability. The global water market is headed toward $600B, and we’re carving out a bold, conscious piece of that future.

 Who It's For:
Luxury resorts. Organic stores. Wellness spas. Conscious consumers. Visionary investors.

This is the water that fits where other waters don’t. It looks better on the table, tastes better in the glass, and feels better in the body. Because it is.

Join us as we introduce the world to Itabo Water — Liquid Gold, Bottled at the Source.

#LiveWater #ZeroMicroplastics #LuxuryHydration #PuertoRico #ItaboWater #Wellness #SustainableBrand

Nuestro objetivo es contar con una importante variedad de productos de primer nivel que permitan a nuestros clientes encontrar la mejor opción para la realización de sus proyectos en cada situación particular. Name: J&R Water Systems
Description:
At J&R Water Systems, we believe your home’s water should do more than just flow, it should protect your health, enhance your comfort, and preserve your investment in your home.

For too many homeowners, water is a silent source of stress: unpleasant tastes and odors, hard water scale damaging appliances, and invisible contaminants that make you question its safety. We understand the frustration, because we’ve helped countless families just like yours find clarity and a solution that lasts.

Our Mission:
To deliver safe, great-tasting water to every faucet in your home, while protecting your family’s health, your appliances, and your peace of mind.

Why We Do What We Do
Every homeowner we meet shares a common goal:

- Safety: we help you experience confidence that every glass, shower, and load of laundry is free from harmful contaminants.

- Comfort:  our customers experience softer skin, shinier hair, and spotless dishes without harsh water residue through out water treatment systems.

- Protection:  our customers appliances last longer and do not have costly hard water damage.

- Clarity: our customers know exactly what is in their water and how to make it better.

As a Certified Halo Water Partner, we bring proven, whole-home water solutions backed by advanced filtration technology and decades of industry expertise.

Name: Aquanix
Description:
At Aquanix, we believe that water is life. In Liberia, thousands of families, schools, and health facilities still struggle to access safe, reliable, and affordable water. Women and children walk long distances to fetch water, and communities face preventable health risks from waterborne diseases. We exist to change that reality.

 Our Vision
A Liberia where every household, school, and community has reliable access to safe, clean drinking water.

 Our Mission
We deliver dependable, cost-effective, and sustainable water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) solutions that improve public health, empower women and youth, and build resilient communities.

 What We Do
Water Purification & Treatment – Supplying ceramic and bio-sand filters, portable gravity-fed units, chlorine tablets, liquid chlorination kits, and solar-powered UV purifiers designed for affordability, durability, and ease of use.

Safe Storage & Distribution – Providing household water containers with taps, collapsible carriers, and community-level pipelines, wells, boreholes, and reservoirs to ensure continuous and safe water supply.

Sanitation & Hygiene Infrastructure – Building modern toilets, sewage management systems, and handwashing stations for homes, schools, and health facilities—paired with hygiene promotion and community training.

Research & Innovation in WASH – We place evidence at the heart of our work. Our team conducts formative research, Social and Behavior Change Communication (SBCC) studies, monitoring and evaluation, cost–benefit analyses, and impact assessments to ensure every intervention is effective, sustainable, and tailored to local needs. We also pilot and scale innovative WASH technologies, integrate digital platforms for monitoring and payments, and strengthen local capacity to manage systems for the long term.

Name: AREOLLA 01
Description:
Areolla 01 merupakan depot air minum isi ulang yang berdiri sejak tahun 2021. Depot air minum isi ulang adalah sebuah tempat atau fasilitas yang menyediakan jasa pengisian ulang air minum dalam kemasan galon atau botol. Depot ini biasanya memiliki sistem pengolahan air yang memadai untuk menghasilkan air minum yang bersih dan sehat.

Berikut adalah beberapa ciri dan fungsi depot air minum isi ulang:

1. Pengolahan air: Depot air minum isi ulang memiliki sistem pengolahan air yang memadai, seperti filter, reverse osmosis, dan UV sterilizer, untuk menghasilkan air minum yang bersih dan sehat.
2. Pengisian ulang: Depot ini menyediakan jasa pengisian ulang air minum dalam kemasan galon atau botol.
3. Kualitas air: Depot air minum isi ulang harus memastikan bahwa air yang dihasilkan memenuhi standar kualitas air minum yang ditetapkan oleh pemerintah.
4. Kebersihan: Depot ini harus menjaga kebersihan dan sanitasi lingkungan kerja untuk mencegah kontaminasi air.
5. Pelayanan: Depot air minum isi ulang biasanya menyediakan pelayanan pengiriman air minum ke rumah-rumah pelanggan.

Depot air minum isi ulang memiliki beberapa kelebihan, seperti:

- Menghemat biaya: Dengan mengisi ulang air minum, pelanggan dapat menghemat biaya dibandingkan dengan membeli air minum dalam kemasan.
- Ramah lingkungan: Mengisi ulang air minum dapat mengurangi jumlah sampah plastik dan botol air minum.
- Kualitas air yang terjamin: Depot air minum isi ulang harus memastikan bahwa air yang dihasilkan memenuhi standar kualitas air minum yang ditetapkan oleh pemerintah.

Name: Water₂O | Home Purification Systems
Description:
Water₂O designs, installs, and maintains whole-home water systems that make tap water taste better, feel better, and protect your home. We serve homeowners, builders, and property managers across Los Angeles, Ventura, Orange, and select NY tristate communities.

What we do: in-home testing for pH, chlorine, hardness, and iron. Softening to cut the scale that damages fixtures and shortens appliance life. Reverse osmosis for great-tasting drinking water. UV where biology risk is a concern. Ongoing service so it stays set-and-forget. SoCal homes see real value because much of the region has hard to very hard water, which drives scale and wear. 

Why it matters: disinfectants make water safe but can affect taste, smell, and even how your skin and hair feel. Many cities, including Los Angeles, use chloramine instead of chlorine, which changes which filters actually work. We spec media and systems for your local supply. 

Forward-looking quality: if PFAS shows up on your report or you want extra assurance, we install solutions using technologies the EPA and state health agencies note can reduce PFAS when properly certified, including activated carbon, reverse osmosis, and ion exchange. We’ll match the certification to your goal. 

How we work: quick phone triage, fast on-site test, a clear options sheet with good-better-best, same-week install for most homes, clean workmanship that respects high-end finishes, and a maintenance plan that keeps performance on track.

What you get: cleaner, better-tasting water at every tap, less scale on glass and tile, longer appliance life, and a simple point of contact when anything changes with your water. Softening reduces hardness minerals that create scale. Anti-scale conditioners can help with buildup but aren’t the same as true softening; we explain both and price them transparently. 

Let’s test your water, pick the right setup, and get it done right the first time

Name: Sledge Precision Instruments
Description: Sledge Precision Instruments is a Negev-based start-up that offers technical expertise on the issues of regulatory compliance for the water sector.  Our focus is on hardware development and technological innovation for reservoir monitoring/modeling, but we are involved in all aspects of the water sector.  Sledge emerged after winning the Netafim Accelerator hosted at Ben Gurion University in Be'er Sheva, Israel in February 2025.  We are a technician and operator focused company, we are technologists only for the sake of public health and lowering water monitoring costs for our clients.   Sledge was started by Jonathan Leiman, a hybrid professional in the water field with 15+ years of experience as a consultant and compliance engineer in the environmental science fields of fisheries and water management.  Sledge’s approach to water resource management is to seek deep-tech solutions to improve the cost-effectiveness of monitoring analytes like harmful algal bloom and emerging contaminants via technology like miniaturized biochip-based electrochemical sensors.  If your company or organization is in need of an improved compliance forecast, introducing new technologies to water markets or has a new technology that needs a practical approach to product market fit via rigorous feedback from operators across several sectors of the market including water supply utilities, recreational water quality, irrigation water monitoring and aquaculture please contact us.

Sobre a Empresa
Experiência e conhecimento que vem passando de geração por geração.
Vindo de uma família de perfuradores com três gerações, onde o primogênito perfurava poços caipira de forma manual para ajudar amigos e vizinhos a saciar a sede dos animais e cultivar pequenas plantações. Em seguida, seu filho utilizava equipamentos rudimentares que levavam semanas para perfurar um poço tubular, buscando aliviar a seca no norte de Minas Gerais. Agora, o neto cresceu nesse ambiente e, ao longo de décadas, adquiriu conhecimento e experiência, transformando essa tradição familiar em um legado. Acompanhado de uma equipe de profissionais excelentes, nossa missão é encurtar o caminho da água até você.

HVT beregening levert voor ieder project een beregeningsinstallatie op maat.   Kwaliteit en zeer scherpe prijzen zijn de uitgangspunten. 

Dit streven  wordt gerealiseerd door de kennis en ervaring op het gebied Daarnaast beschikt het bedrijf over de juiste machines en gereedschappen waardoor er efficiënt en ergonomisch gewerkt wordt. 

Zoals eerder benoemd levert het bedrijf ook losse techniek en materialen.
Er worden uitsluitend  Europese en Amerikaanse merken en producten verwerkt en geleverd. Door het goede netwerk van directe fabrikanten en leveranciers kan er zeer scherp worden geleverd aan onze relaties. 
Zo realiseert het bedrijf het de zekerheid op het gebied van kwaliteit en betaalbaarheid.  

Dit in combinatie met een gezonde mentaliteit maakt HVT Beregening een competitieve, groeiende onderneming in de branche.

Em São Paulo, em função da falta de mananciais abundantes e do desenvolvimento urbano, o cenário é de escassez extrema. Essa escassez de recursos hídricos, aliada à piora constante da condição da água dos mananciais que abastecem a Grande São Paulo, contribuem para um cenário de insegurança no  abastecimento e má qualidade de água.

Dentro deste cenário, nasceu a Adriann Water, cuja filosofia única de trabalho proporciona aos grandes e médios consumidores de água a oportunidade de contar com seu próprio sistema de abastecimento e tratamento de água e esgoto. Investimos constantemente em tecnologia, visando a melhor eficiência em nossos projetos e conforto para nossos clientes. Name: SmartNet
Description:
Smartnet is a deep-tech, IIT Madras Pravartak-backed initiative building automated, cloud-based solutions for water supply networks. We help water boards, utilities, EPC contractors, consultants, and researchers design and operate distribution systems more efficiently and at a fraction of the traditional cost.

Our mission is simple: make professional water network design and smart monitoring accessible, automated, and affordable. 

 What We Offer

We provide an end-to-end Smart Water Management Platform with five integrated modules:

 Network Design – Automated, low-cost design workflows for new and existing water networks.

 Sensor Placement – Optimized sensor locations for maximum coverage and minimum cost.

 Sensor Calibration – Data-driven calibration tools to improve accuracy and reduce field errors.

 Leakage Detection – Cloud-based algorithms to identify losses quickly and improve NRW performance.

 Tank Scheduler – Intelligent pump/valve scheduling for reliable and equitable supply.
In addition to these modules, we also offer customizable solutions tailored to your specific operational and design requirements.

These tools help utilities move toward data-driven, automated, and equitable water distribution.

 Who We Serve

Water boards & municipal utilities

Engineering consultants & EPC contractors

Smart city projects

Academicians & researchers working on water supply

Small-scale consultancies looking to adopt digital design tools

 Why Smartnet Stands Out

Cloud-based, low-cost platform accessible from anywhere

Built on decades of research at IIT Madras

Combines IoT, hydraulics, and optimisation in one ecosystem

Supports both design consulting and deep-tech solutions

Currently running pilots and onboarding early customers

 Our Stage

Smartnet is in the pilot deployment phase, refining the platform with real-world feedback and expanding to new clients across India. (Not yet incorporated.)

Description:
Im Herzen von UrQuelle steht unsere jahrzehntelange Expertise in der umfassenden Aufbereitung und Veredelung von Trinkwasser. Unser Streben hat uns zur Entwicklung des UrQuelle Diamant Systems geführt – einer revolutionären Technologie, die Leitungswasser in ursprüngliche Quellwasserqualität verwandelt.

Unser Fokus liegt darauf, nachhaltige und ganzheitliche Lösungen zu bieten, die über die reine Wasserqualität hinausgehen. Mit dem UrQuelle Diamant System haben wir eine innovative Plattform geschaffen, die es jedem ermöglicht, täglich von den Vorteilen und dem Geschmackserlebnis des Urquellwassers zu profitieren. Das ist nicht nur eine Revolution im Bereich der Wasserreinigung, sondern auch ein wichtiger Schritt zur Verbesserung der Lebensqualität und Gesundheit.

Die positiven Auswirkungen unseres Systems gehen weit über den Einzelnen hinaus. Durch die Verwendung des UrQuelle Diamant Systems entfällt der Bedarf an gekauftem Wasser und reduziert damit die Umweltbelastung durch Plastikflaschen erheblich. Es ist eine Investition in die Gesundheit und die Umwelt.

Wasser ist das Lebenselixier schlechthin, das bis zu 70% unseres Körpers ausmacht. Daher ist es entscheidend, dass wir täglich hochwertiges Wasser zu uns nehmen. Mit UrQuelle setzen wir einen neuen Standard für Trinkwasser und laden Sie ein, die Verbesserung Ihrer Lebensqualität und Gesundheit aktiv mitzugestalten.

Wir sind stolz darauf, mit unserem UrQuelle Diamant System einen Beitrag zu einer besseren und nachhaltigeren Zukunft leisten zu können und freuen uns darauf, Sie auf dieser spannenden Reise zu begleiten.

Name: Filter Purity
Description:
Discover the essence of hydration with Filter Purity, your gateway to a life enriched by pure, clean, and healthy water. In a world where the quality of drinking water is often compromised by contaminants and the environmental impact of bottled water escalates daily, Filter Purity emerges as a beacon of innovation and sustainability. This cutting-edge tap water filtration system is designed not just to purify but to transform your water experience entirely.

At the heart of Filter Purity lies its advanced 0.2-micron filtration technology, a testament to its superior capability to remove harmful contaminants. Utilizing a harmonious blend of diatom clay, activated charcoal, and PP cotton, this system ensures every drop of water is free from chlorine, lead, bacteria, and other pollutants, safeguarding your health with every sip. The diatom clay initiates the purification process by sieving out larger particles, setting the stage for the activated charcoal to absorb chemicals and odors, enhancing the water's taste and smell. The final touch, PP cotton, polishes the water, removing the tiniest particles to deliver crystal-clear water.

But Filter Purity's commitment extends beyond clean water. Embodying eco-friendly principles, it champions the reduction of single-use plastic bottles, addressing the urgent call for environmental preservation. By switching to Filter Purity, you contribute to lessening the global plastic waste crisis, making a significant impact with a simple, everyday choice.

Designed with modern homes in mind, Filter Purity boasts a sleek, minimalist aesthetic that seamlessly integrates into any kitchen decor. Its ease of installation is unparalleled, offering a hassle-free setup process that makes pure, filtered water accessible to everyone. Compatible with 99% of faucets and requiring no tools for installation, it embodies convenience and efficiency.

Unser Angebot
Wir bieten eine breite Palette an Dienstleistungen, von der Installation und Wartung von Enthärtungsanlagen und Trinkwasserfiltern bis hin zu umfassenden mikrobiologischen und chemisch-physikalischen Untersuchungen. Unsere Experten führen gründliche Analysen durch, um potenzielle Risiken zu identifizieren und zu beseitigen. Zudem unterstützen wir unsere Kunden bei der Erfüllung aller gesetzlichen Anforderungen, etwa durch die Erstellung von Gefährdungsanalysen und Probenahmeplänen.

Unser Engagement
Kundenzufriedenheit steht bei uns an erster Stelle. Wir bieten individuelle Beratung, schnelle und effiziente Auftragsabwicklung sowie transparente und faire Preise. Bei uns finden Sie einen vertrauensvollen Partner, der Sie auch über die Auftragsabwicklung hinaus unterstützt.

Kontaktieren Sie uns
Lernen Sie uns näher kennen und erfahren Sie, wie wir Ihnen helfen können, die Qualität Ihres Trinkwassers zu sichern. Kontaktieren Sie uns für eine persönliche Beratung oder weitere Informationen.

Name: Ecoloblue NC
Description:
Ecoloblue NC propose des fontaines à eau atmosphérique, produisant de l’eau potable par condensation de l’humidité de l’air.
Sans bonbonne, sans raccordement, sans tuyauterie : une simple prise électrique suffit pour générer une eau pure, fraîche ou chaude, directement sur site.
Deux gammes sont proposées :
• Modèles domestiques et de bureau : 30 à 60 L/jour, avec eau chaude/froide, réglable et désactivable
• Unités industrielles renforcées : de 100 à 5 000 L/jour, adaptées aux sites isolés ou aux usages collectifs
Avec près de 10 ans d’expérience, Ecoloblue NC a installé plus de 200 machines en Nouvelle-Calédonie et dans les îles voisines.
Nos références incluent la CPS, la SLN, le Centre culturel Tjibaou, des mairies (Lifou, Maré, Ouvéa, Poum…), des tribus, entreprises privées, particuliers…
Nous exportons également vers le Vanuatu, Wallis-et-Futuna, et Tonga.
Nos fontaines offrent autonomie, sobriété, sécurité sanitaire et s’inscrivent pleinement dans les défis du changement climatique.

Ecoloblue NC provides atmospheric water generators that produce drinking water by condensing moisture from the air.
No water bottles, no plumbing, no pipe connection needed — just a power outlet to generate pure, hot or cold water on-site.
We offer two main product lines:
• Home and office units: 30 to 60 L/day, with adjustable and switchable hot/cold water
• Industrial-grade units: 100 to 5,000 L/day, ideal for remote or collective use
With almost 10 years of experience, Ecoloblue NC has installed 200+ machines across New Caledonia and the Pacific region.
Our trusted clients include CPS, SLN, Tjibaou Cultural Centre, local councils (Lifou, Maré, Ouvéa, Poum…), tribes, private companies and individuals.
We also export to Vanuatu, Wallis & Futuna, and Tonga.
Our machines bring autonomy, resilience, and health security, responding to today’s water and climate challenges.
